programme.desc: The lives of NCIS members are in jeopardy when they come face-to-face with the infamous port-to-port killer.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Politics
programme.desc: Voight's friend, Congressman Scott Graynor, is found passed out in his hotel room with a dead Ukrainian girl. Intelligence discovers that the murder is connected to a sting and Burgess must choose between compromising her case or her FBI boyfriend's.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Monster
programme.desc: Intelligence is on the track of a pill mill spreading in the suburbs of Chicago and the doctor enabling it after the death of Judge Tommy Wells' daughter leads them to it. Voight discovers who had been leaking the 21st's information.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Rabbit Hole
programme.desc: Halstead and Camila's partying puts him in the middle of a drug-related homicide, forcing him to choose between his loyalty to his unit and his girl. Voight discovers the mole in his unit.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Confidential
programme.desc: While trying to find the pimp, Intelligence discovers the women's shelter where he scouts girls. Burgess moves the case forward with a series of confidential tips but risks putting her informant in harm's way.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chasing Monsters
programme.desc: A gang from El Salvador infiltrates Chicago and Intelligence works with a visiting detective to put an end to the crew's brutal tactics. Antonio finds himself getting close to the Salvadorian detective Marcella Gomez but learns she has a hidden motive.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Anthem
programme.desc: A basketball star is murdered after an anti-police rally and Intelligence navigates a politically charged environment to track the killer. Woods' daughter Brianna gets tangled up in the case.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Sisterhood
programme.desc: Intelligence tracks a vigilante killing rapists. The investigation hits home for Burgess who begins to question if the men who attacked her sister truly paid for their actions.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre named Shrek finds his swamp home overrun with exiled fairytale creatures, including a talkative companion named Donkey. Shrek strikes a deal: he will get his swamp back if he rescues Princess Fiona and brings her to the scheming Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: Movie: How the Grinch Stole Christmas
programme.desc: A nasty creature plans to steal Christmas from the residents of Whoville, who love Christmas, until a small child named Cindy Lou Who decides to befriend him. A fun-filled remake of the classic cartoon and Dr. Seuss favourite.

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone
programme.desc: A young boy is accidentally left at home when his family goes away for Christmas vacation. He must fend for himself as he faces burglars, scary neighbours and other obstacles. At first he enjoys his freedom, but soon wants his family back for Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Home Alone 2: Lost in New York
programme.desc: A young boy mistakenly takes the wrong plane when his family goes on Christmas vacation and ends up in New York City, fending off suspicious hotel staff, a kindly bird woman in disguise and two burglars he fought against last Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Black Nativity
programme.desc: A Baltimore teen travels to New York City to spend Christmas with his estranged family, and finds himself on an unexpected, inspirational journey.

programme.title: Living Single: Who's Scooping Who?
programme.desc: Khadijah vies with a pompous reporter to break a story about a promoter who fixes fights.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love for New York
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony, they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash talking until Chamo delivers a 'New York Note.' The next challenge will test the guys on their earning potential; New York likes to spend money so she needs a man who can bring home the bacon.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys; it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build doghouses for NY's Chihuhua, Her Majesty. Some teams work together well but others fight.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She invites her friend Tamara Moore from the WNBA to put her men to the test and the best man wins a date with NY. One of the guys ends up in the hospital.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The six guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-olds run in the front door, it's a princess party.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming to Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining five guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: Movie: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: A woman offers stranded family a place to stay during a blizzard. Unbeknownst to her, they are members of a royal family. Despite their different backgrounds, the woman shows her guests what a small-town Christmas is all about.

programme.title: Movie: A Nashville Christmas Carol
programme.desc: A television producer is forced to work with the man who broke her heart on a country music Christmas special while being interrupted by Christmas spirits determined for her to revisit her past.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas House
programme.desc: When TV star Mike Mitchell's parents ask him to bring back a revered family tradition, he revisits the Mitchell family magic of Christmases past.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: The author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his young niece and nephew for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: With Love, Christmas
programme.desc: An ad executive and her uptight co-worker must create the ultimate Christmas commercial. To complicate things, they are also each-others Secret Santa.

programme.title: Movie: Mingle All the Way
programme.desc: A young entrepreneur invents a new dating app designed to help singles find dates to events. She personally tests it out in the weeks before Christmas and is connected with a like-minded individual whom she's already dated, several times.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Made to Order
programme.desc: A Christmas amateur finds himself in charge of his family's holiday celebration. Desperate for help, he enlists an expert in all things Christmas and together, they discover what's truly important in life.

programme.title: Movie: Cherished Memories: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: A couple celebrate their second Christmas together, but, an unexpected guest, and a fight to save their town's community centre, ensures they have a Christmas they have never forget.

programme.title: Movie: A Cookie Cutter Christmas
programme.desc: Two long-time rival school teachers duke it out during the holidays in a bake-off. With both determined to win the prize, their competitiveness could jeopardize what matters most this Christmas season.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actors Rochelle Aytes and Mark Taylor from the Hallmark Channel original movie, 'A Christmas Tree Grows in Colorado.' Then, Vanessa Lengies and Corey Sevier discuss their movie 'Heart of the Holidays.'

programme.title: Movie: A December Bride
programme.desc: An aspiring interior designer is dreading the wedding of her cousin, who is marrying her ex-fiancé. She accepts an offer to go with a friend, the one responsible for introducing the soon-to-be bride and groom.

programme.title: Movie: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A single mother who's lost all interest in Christmas finds just what she needs when her uncle comes to visit.

programme.title: Movie: We're the Millers
programme.desc: A small-time drug dealer hires a fake family to help him smuggle drugs into the country.

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers

programme.title: Movie: Grown Ups 2
programme.desc: A man moves his family back to his hometown so he can continue his childish antics with his best friends.

programme.title: South Park: Asspen

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die

programme.title: South Park: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls

programme.title: South Park: Fishsticks

programme.title: South Park: Christian Rock Hard

programme.title: South Park: Free Willzyx

programme.title: Forensic Files: Without a Prayer
programme.desc: Madalyn Murray O'Hair and her two top lieutenants disappeared with no shortage of suspects. Her abduction may never have been solved if it weren't for the discovery of a headless, handless body, and the serial number on an artificial hip.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Big Chill
programme.desc: When a woman dies after a long illness, investigators have to determine if her death was due to natural causes, suicide, or murder.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Smoky Mountain Fury
programme.desc: In the Smoky Mountains, the Raneys visit a wind-ravaged homestead on the brink of total collapse. The Raneys race to shore up key structures and establish a viable homestead business before the next big storm.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: I Don't Want to Die Today
programme.desc: Kilcher road is threatened by a dangerous flood and Otto must repair the vital road before it's washed away. Eve struggles to homeschool her kids, Jane and August score big on a deep-sea fishing trip and Atz Sr. recovers from his surgery.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: I Don't Want to Die Today

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: We're Marooned

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Dakota A-Frame
programme.desc: Jared 'Cappie' Capp showcases the luxury of off-grid living by building a modern home in the Black Hills of South Dakota. This stunning all-solar-powered abode will have a wood-burning fireplace, gourmet kitchen and a 400-square-foot loft.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway
programme.desc: Building pro Mark Smith builds an off-grid modular home high up on a cliff off the coast of Vancouver, Canada. Everyone's on their toes and working as carefully as possible as even the smallest mistake could result in the home crashing down.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: We're Marooned

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: West Coast Island Getaway

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Caddy Rust Bucket/ Bel-Air Beauty Part 1

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Caddy Rust Bucket/ Bel-Air Beauty Part 2
programme.desc: Rust-ridden Caddy dumped, Richard gambles that the GMG crew can recoup his losses with a '60 Bel Air. Christie talks money: first with a dad who wants to punk his teenage son with a Yugo and then with Richard trying to convince him to hire his sister.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Chopped Cabriolet and 'Vette Rescue
programme.desc: The crew helps a widow by buying her husband's Ford '32 Cabriolet and many hot rod projects. They rescue an heirloom '62 Corvette from a garage falling down around it, but not all the family is pleased Richard has it. Richard makes a big announcement.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Killer COPO Camaro
programme.desc: Richard gets his hands dirty building a $100,000 2013 COPO Camaro from the wheels up on the VIP assembly line. Aaron ignores his request to work on a newly arrived 1930 Model A and builds his own dream vehicle instead while the Monkeys tackle the A.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Cool Customline
programme.desc: KC's beloved but broken down '55 Ford Customline gets new life and Richard needs to flip it to Shark Tank's Mark Cuban. George Foreman takes off with Richard's prize Mustang while Richard and Dennis haggle with a WWII vet over a '38 Aston Martin.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Troll's Choice Rolls-Royce
programme.desc: When Richard 'accidentally' buys $92K worth of cars at an auction, his bookkeeper sister insists he flip all five cars in one week. Some go more easily and profitably than others but it's a weirdly built Rolls Royce that even Aaron has a hard time fixing.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Aaron's Falcon Racecar
programme.desc: Aaron falls in love with and buys a famous '63 Ford Falcon race car off Richard, but will the original owner be impressed by Aaron's Gas Money style? Meanwhile, Richard flips a 1919 Nash and an unusually painted truck.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Mustang Mania
programme.desc: Aaron chances the wrath of the Big Monkey when he overrides Richard's instructions on a Mustang Fastback. After picking up a 'Holy Grail' Boss 429 Mustang in Minnesota, Richard questions Dennis' decision to buy a rustbucket Jaguar E-Class buried in snow.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Jacked-Up Jeep
programme.desc: Aaron and the Gas Monkey crew overhaul a Jeep in 24 hours to surprise a friend. Richard flips a funky gull-winged Bricklin. Daphne convinces a reluctant Richard to hire his nephew. Dennis and Richard argue over how best to sell their COPO Camaros.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fleetline Superflip Frenzy
programme.desc: It's a gas monkey fire sale when Richard quick flips a menagerie of cars to make enough cash to buy back the first car he and Aaron built together 10 years ago. Richard and Dennis literally roll the dice on a 57 Chevy back in snowy Minnesota.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fast Moving F100
programme.desc: Aaron's not impressed by the '72 Ford Pantera Richard picks up, but he and the Monkeys have fun bringing a Ford F100 truck back to life. Then, they head to Tennessee to try to buy back two pieces of Gas Monkey history: a ratrod and a panhead motorcycle.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: The Shorty Short VW Bus

programme.title: Closing Bell

programme.title: The Loud House: Washed Up/ Recipe for Disaster

programme.title: The Loud House: Deep Cuts/ Game Off
programme.desc: Luna leads a protest to save the high school music club; Lana becomes desperate to play Lincoln's trash-themed video game.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Astronauts: Day 3

programme.desc: The case of a gruesome stabbing death of a bullied teenager remains unsolved for 27 years--until a rookie cold case detective sees a new clue in an old crime scene photo.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Sweethearts, Silenced
programme.desc: A killer authors a book about his con-man past that becomes the key to solving a 29-year-old cold case of two high school sweethearts, and three other cold case murders, leading police to believe he could be the Zodiac Killer.

programme.desc: A 17-year-old girl goes missing in a small Kentucky town. Two weeks later, she is found strangled in the woods.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Officer Down
programme.desc: The longest running cold case of a law enforcement officer in the United States was the murder of Sheriff's Lt. Joe Clark, who was shot execution style in his own home. It took 33 years to discover the truth.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Circle of Friends
programme.desc: When 18-year-old Shannon Siders' body was found in the woods, nearly everyone in the small town of Newaygo, Michigan, becomes a suspect. It takes 22 years for a special cold case unit to solve the crime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: The Jokers perform unusual methods of DNA testing and get too close for comfort at the grocery store. Then, tonight's big loser becomes a shell of a man after he cracks under pressure during a presentation at a children's museum.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Learn who was the most excited to film at Universal Studios and why the guys decided against posing as security guards. Plus, take a look at the exciting costumes the guys originally planned for a challenge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Suck to Suck
programme.desc: Find out which Joker has his own line of beer, and how often Joe has eaten garbage on camera. Plus, learn which famous entrepreneur spoke at the same conference as Murr.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Well...
programme.desc: Learn how the guys create rules for new challenges and which Jokers used to carpool to the set.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food After Da' Club Episode
programme.desc: The guys hit the virtual nightclub with DJ Marshmello and Edie Falco. Joe sends the guys some bottle service.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: The guys try not to crack up during a four-way face off and later find that a stroll with the Gatto pups is no walk in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser suffers more than muscle failure in a major league embarrassment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Dumbbell
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr test their parental instincts by reading their daughters' diaries, then give presentations that are anything but normal. Later, tonight's big loser gets painfully honest with bodybuilders at the gym.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Well...
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr play a game of tag at a coffee shop, then convince shoppers to deliver sketchy messages at the grocery store. Plus, tonight's big loser might lose his mind in Impractical Jokers' first-ever non-punishment punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Operation Hidden Roof

programme.title: The Real Housewives of Salt Lake City: A Snow Mountain of Trouble

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rope a Dope
programme.desc: The guys look into buying a 1929 Chopped Ford Coupe if they can agree on a price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Air Mail
programme.desc: Check out a huge collection of mini bikes from the 1970's. An early 1900s baseball bat swings into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Comic Con
programme.desc: Chumlee and Corey take a look at some sketches drawn by Spider-Man creator Stan Lee. Check out a Japanese machine gun camera.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: What Happens in Vegas
programme.desc: The guys check out a collection of sex education records from 1948. Then, Corey and Chumlee check out a 'blue book' from the Las Vegas Sheriff's Department.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Merchant of Vegas
programme.desc: The guys check out a Cushman scooter allegedly used by paratroopers during WWII.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Put Your Hands Up
programme.desc: The guys check out a wanted poster for legendary criminal John Dillinger. Then, a Lambretta scooter is brought in to the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: All In
programme.desc: A poker cheating device finds its way into the shop. Then, a mysterious suicide ring believed to be from WWII finds its way into Rick's fingers.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rock Stars and Race Cars
programme.desc: A self-portrait from Rolling Stones guitarist Ron Wood makes its way into the shop. Then, Rick gets nostalgic when a stack of love letters handwritten by Mickey Rooney are mailed in. Later, Rick toys with the idea of buying slot cars from his childhood.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Game Over
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get lift off when a hovercraft makes its way to the shop. Corey checks out some 1960's Beatles bobbleheads. Then, Rick lets the guys play with a new arcade game that has come into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Generation Gap
programme.desc: A Roman shield movie prop from 'Cleopatra' pops by the shop. Then, a 1922 silver peace dollar is brought in. Later, the guys talk about their generations.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Anytime, Any Mace
programme.desc: Prepare for battle with the Pawn Stars as Rick checks out a medieval mace. Will it be a fair fight for this primitive weapon or is he in for a low blow? Then, Rick and the Old Man check out a set of cap guns from the 1950s.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Choo Choo Chum
programme.desc: A signed photo of Howard Hughes flies into the shop. Then, Rick takes his best shot when a Marlin rifle triggers his interest. Later, after Rick purchases an old model train, Chumlee decides to play conductor.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: My Country, Pawn of Thee
programme.desc: Handwritten lyrics to 'My Country, Tis of Thee'; a WWII era Linemar Space Explorer Toy; a United Nations Helmet from Somalia; a giant bell from the classic El Rancho Hotel and Casino.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Seven Barreled Pawn
programme.desc: A Nock Valley gun used by the Royal Navy; an etching by Joan Miro; the first American pasta machine.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Going, Going Pawn!
programme.desc: The Pawns Stars are knocked out of the park when a drive to L. A. promises Rick a peek at Babe Ruth's "called shot" bat.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ultimate Fighting Pawn
programme.desc: An antique high wheel bike captivates Rick. Chum sells one of Rick's beloved Japanese katanas to UFC President Dana White. Rick heads out to look at a beautifully-restored grand piano from the 1800s. An original Walkman cassette player stops by.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: President's Day Sale
programme.desc: Rick is after an autographed card of President Abraham Lincoln. Corey and Chum consider paying a hefty sum for a President Bill Clinton designed golf driver shaft, until discovering that he may not have used it himself.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Big Fish in a Small Pawn
programme.desc: Rick tackles a set of San Francisco 49ers Super Bowl rings with a high asking price. Then, Rick and Corey check out a spear gun.

programme.desc: In 1928, two Kansas high-school sweethearts experience issues with intimacy and sex, as a result of overbearing parents.

programme.title: Movie: Hannah and Her Sisters
programme.desc: A family begins to fall apart when a woman's husband falls for her beautiful sister.

programme.title: Movie: Bananas

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: After Apocalypse
programme.desc: The latest scientific investigations reveals the untold story of how a cataclysmic eruption transformed an entire region.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Gate to Hell
programme.desc: According to legend, the ancient Roman city of Hierapolis hides a secret portal to the underworld beneath its streets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Caligula: Sex, Lies, and Empire
programme.desc: Legendary tales depict Caligula as the most notorious emperor in ancient Roman history, and now, new evidence uncovers the truth behind these lurid stories, revealing an astonishing story of murder, intrigue, and dynastic family power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: After Apocalypse

programme.title: Egypt's Lost World: The Buried Wonder
programme.desc: Armed with the latest satellite technology, NASA scientists and archaeologists join forces to uncover astonishing mysteries behind Egypt's greatest secrets of forgotten pyramids and lost treasures that still remain buried in ancient sands.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hidden City of the Incas
programme.desc: The lost city of Machu Picchu is one of the greatest mysteries in archaeology. Scientists do not know why this city in the clouds was built, but investigations into secret Inca codes and deformed skeletons might finally reveal its ultimate mystery.

programme.title: Unearthed: Curse of the Seventh Wonder
programme.desc: The Lighthouse of Alexandria is one of the world's original Seven Wonders, but it could have been home to a mysterious superweapon, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the secrets of this fabled death ray and its long-lost home.

programme.title: Unearthed: Leaning Tower of Pisa: The New Mystery
programme.desc: The Leaning Tower of Pisa is one of the world's most iconic buildings, and it's also the site of an 800-year-old mystery; using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the archaeological evidence to reveal when it might finally fall over.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost World of Atlantis
programme.desc: New discoveries on a strange island in the Mediterranean might offer new clues in the hunt for Atlantis. Using cutting-edge archaeological methods, experts reveal the apocalyptic event that destroyed this long-lost civilization.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Treasure of Solomon
programme.desc: The High Priests of the Temple in Jerusalem could have hidden their most sacred items before the city was sacked by the Romans and the Dead Sea Scrolls could actually be a treasure map to these hidden wonders. See what else lies under this ancient city.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Holy Grail
programme.desc: Find out what The Holy Grail could have been, whether it was a cup from the Last Supper or used to cleanse Jesus’ body after the Crucifixion, and see where it could be today.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of James Bond
programme.desc: James Bond is one of the famous characters in history, and new discoveries reveal there might be a secret truth behind this world-famous figure. Experts team up with a former spy to separate fact from fiction and reveal the secrets of modern espionage.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Mystery of the Giants
programme.desc: Discover why so many of our cultures refer to giants and if they were myths or could have actually walked the earth. See the tombs and skeletons discovered in Sardinia, where evidence of giants may have been found.

programme.title: Forbidden History: In Search of King Arthur
programme.desc: The legend of King Arthur is one of a courageous fighter and leader in battle, but for centuries, the fabled king has been a mystery to historians. Find out if his story of Camelot, Excalibur and Guinevere just an elaborate fairytale.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Ghosts of the Berlin Wall
programme.desc: Experts explore the mysterious abandoned ruins that were once behind the Berlin Wall, and these new investigations turn up discoveries that reveal the dark truths of East Germany and its terrifying secret police.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret History of Jesus
programme.desc: Experts use new discoveries to reveal the true story of Jesus Christ, and using cutting-edge tech, this critical evidence is challenging everything we know about the man who changed history.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Have to Get Out
programme.desc: Edward Pehowic harbored dark secrets before he married Robin Healey, and she would catch only glimpses of her husband's dark side. But it wasn't until after she finally escaped from him once and for all that she realized just how evil he was.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Until We Meet Again
programme.desc: When James Henslee realized that he was the police's prime suspect, he couldn't believe it.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Have To Do The Right Thing
programme.desc: When Tim Kreider discovered proof that his son, Alec, was responsible for a horrific crime, he knew what the right thing to do was.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Brother Made History

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Won't Tell Us Why
programme.desc: Richard and Ryan Girgis knew their father, Magdi Girgis, was a cheapskate, prone to violence, and not a particularly good father. But when their family was torn apart, neither wanted to admit deep down that they knew who was behind it.

programme.title: American Monster: Stand by Your Men

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Love in Flames
programme.desc: Family tragedies send a couple's dream of a perfect life up in flames.

programme.desc: A handsome marine lands the girl of his dreams. But the perils of their long distance love push these newlyweds to the edge. When Shari and Deon's romance misfires in a tragic accident - the collateral damage is deadly.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Crazy Love
programme.desc: Pamela and Michael fall back in love, twenty years after the high school sweethearts break up. But the issues that first drove them apart have intensified over the years—and their second chance at love turns deadly.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Living with the Devil
programme.desc: When Darren and Elizabeth marry eight weeks after meeting, no one thinks it's a good idea. The couple just doesn't care, until one of them turns up dead.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Bored to Death
programme.desc: When Opal Skidmore marries Steven Williams, their love is a second chance for the pair to live out their dreams. Until boredom and the lure of the open road spark hidden desires and sexual hijinks leaving this open marriage anything but happy.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Recipe for Death
programme.desc: Eric gives up the Marines to follow his dream as a baker, and believes he's found the sweetest confection possible when he falls for Constance on a blind date. These foodies indulge in the good life until a seven-year itch is scratched by murder.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: A Watery Grave
programme.desc: Jeff and Jeanine Glanda have a picture-perfect family until selfishness and a shameless affair mark the beginning of the end. As money troubles and the threat of divorce breed paranoia and hate, a plot is hatched in the dark heart of a twisted killer.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Vengeance
programme.desc: When in love, some women no longer recognize the difference between right and wrong. If anyone blocks their path to true love, they bulldoze their way through, with lethal results. These Deadly Women have fire in their hearts when they seek 'Vengeance'.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Hunger for Cash
programme.desc: When some women lust for money, it costs family and friends more than their bank balance. Putting money above lives, these 'Deadly Women' have a 'Hunger for Cash.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: Heartless
programme.desc: These women's actions were so cruel they were almost unbelievable. Their callous acts proved they were 'Heartless'.

programme.desc: The Black Devils, a joint American-Canadian mountain warfare unit, are about to go into action. They must mount a do-or-die night-time assault up a treacherous mountain, in extreme weather, to take on heavily-entrenched battle hardened German defenses.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Battle for Sugar Loaf
programme.desc: Taking an otherwise nondescript hill on the embattled island of Okinawa proved to be one of the most incredible battles of WWII. The young weary marines of Charlie Company strained against the searing Pacific sun to see the top of Sugar Loaf Hill.

programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: Ancient Assassins: Medieval Mercenaries

programme.title: Bullet Points: The Vietnam War
programme.desc: American military involvement in Vietnam lasted 12 years and cost the lives of almost 60,000 soldiers. We highlight the decisive moments, from the first shot, to the withdrawal of the last Marine - breaking down the key battles and turning points.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Bulge: Holding the Line
programme.desc: In December 1944, 83,000 Americans are assaulted by 200,000 Germans through thick snow and fog in the Ardennes forest. What follows is the biggest and bloodiest battle of World War II: the Battle of the Bulge.

programme.desc: The biggest naval battle in history will be decided when a small group of under-armed, ill-prepared US ships find themselves in a chaotic and ferocious fight against the largest battleships ever built.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Okinawa: Island Fortress
programme.desc: US troops come up against 120,000 Japanese soldiers on the island of Okinawa. Fighting through mountainous terrain and in treacherous conditions, American forces triumph and pave the way for the end of World War Two.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Hue: Vietnam's Bloodiest Battle
programme.desc: In a final showdown marines must breech the heavily fortified walls of the ancient citadel where thousands of NVA soldiers lie in wait. After one of the bloodiest battles of the entire Vietnam War, the marines are finally victorious.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Megacities
programme.desc: In this episode we'll examine how the Nazis began to stamp their image on Germany and the nations that had fallen under the German jackboot. From plans to redesign Berlin as the capital of the world, to the destruction of Warsaw.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Nazification
programme.desc: A look at how Hitler implemented changes through anti-Semitic clothing laws, the establishing of SS bride schools and breeding programmes that saw children stolen from their parents.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.desc: Mike Holmes travels to the beautiful island of Hilton Head, South Carolina, to advise first time homebuyers Caroline and Diego Mahecha during their search for the perfect family home. Mike goes through the houses and identifies issues.

programme.desc: A couple search for their forever home in Hilton Head. Mike Holmes takes them through the houses and teaches the couple how to choose the best home for their present budget and their future plans.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Holmes Views St. Anthony Homes
programme.desc: In St. Anthony, Minnesota, Rhonda and Leo Bogee are looking for a home that's both within their budget and perfect for their four-member family. Mike goes through houses pointing out the pros and cons for each teaching them how to buy with confidence.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: No Ordinary Buy in Minneapolis
programme.desc: Mike helps Nick and Samantha choose a new home. Sam and Nick are looking at brand new houses and many have yet to be lived in, which means all the more reason to bring along the King of Contractors.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Investment in Brooklyn Park
programme.desc: Carpenter Jake and his realtor wife Lindsay want to buy an investment home to live in, fix up and eventually sell for a profit. The couple shows their favorite options to Mike who helps them see the good, the bad and the ugly.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Mike's Minneapolis Home Hunt
programme.desc: Brenda and Peter have two young daughters and love their Minneapolis neighborhood, but the family has outgrown their home and they're ready to purchase a new one. The couple needs Mike's honest expertise as they view the houses they're considering.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Making Room in Florida
programme.desc: Nicole and Tariq are a fun-loving Florida couple that is ready to buy their first home, preferably with enough room for a future family. They've looked at homes and realize they don't know how to spot the kind of house problems a contractor would see.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Newlyweds Need Help in Florida
programme.desc: Robyn and Anthony are newly married, first-time homebuyers that are moving out of their apartment and the pressure is on to find a home. They're interested in a move-in ready income property or a low-priced home that needs some work.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: On a Mission in St. Petersburg
programme.desc: Mike heads to St. Petersburg, Florida, to help first-time homebuyers Heather and Jay. Along with Heather's young son, the couple plans to move into the best house they can find within their budget.

programme.title: Holmes: Buy It Right: Working a Miracle in Tampa
programme.desc: Sisters Michelle and Sonia run Miracles Outreach to house girls who have aged out of the foster program, and they need a new house and Mike's help.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: Reno's on, But Nobody's Home
programme.desc: A New England couple is ready to buy a bigger home for their growing family. Once renovations begin on their home, they quickly realize they may be in way over their heads.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: The Wife Runs the Reno
programme.desc: Denver natives are searching the city for a larger home for their family of four. He bought their current home before meeting his wife, so she thinks it's her turn to get what she wants.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation: A Renovation Surprise
programme.desc: Midwestern transplants are leaving their Burbank, California rental for more space and a better commute. They find a home, move in and begin a huge renovation, only to find out they're expecting.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Morrill Family Bunkhouse
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on the old army barracks on their family camp that has served as overflow sleeping for over 40 years.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Sacramento, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb swings into Sacramento, California, for three gold-standard meals from the Golden State, including a perfectly fried Chinese-American chicken, a savory multi-meat waffle stack.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Antonio, TX
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels take him to San Antonio, Texas. His first stop is San Antonio's oldest restaurant- a German deli- for the Wienerschnitzel.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Man v. Food Nation: Green Bay
programme.desc: Adam is at the NFL's opening game in Green Bay to showcase the city's best eats.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Best BBQ
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time we started celebrating the cream of the crop. Fire up the grill, because this time we’re inducting the Best BBQ in the history of Man V. Food.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Breakfast Bonanza
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tour of tasty treats has convinced him that breakfast is the most important meal of the day, and he's inducting his favorites into the Man v. Food Hall of Fame.

programme.desc: Noah Cappe goes coastal at the Louisiana Crawfish Festival.

programme.desc: Michael Symon visits his hometown of Cleveland, where a lamb burger with kalamata olive salt gives him a nostalgic taste of his Greek heritage.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Champion Burger Knockouts
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in San Diego with a Champ Burger loaded with beer-braised pork that packs a powerful punch, and he can't pass up a cookie-brownie mashup that satisfies every sweet tooth.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Comedy and Cooking in the City of Angels
programme.desc: Michael Symon and hilarious TV star Billy Gardell embark on an uproarious adventure in Los Angeles filled with laughter, hijinks and visiting a perfect balance of legendary food joints and new spots on the scene.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent D.C. Dining
programme.desc: Michael and Jenni 'JWoww' Farley, reality TV star and winner of Worst Cooks in America: Celebrity Edition, team up to tackle the best classic barbecue, freshest farmhouse burgers and most outrageous microbrews our nation's capital has to offer.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire

programme.desc: Michael practices for the birth of Jan's baby by having Dwight go over possible birthing scenarios. Meanwhile, Michael tells Holly that he will pretend to dislike her for Jan's benefit.

programme.title: The Office: Crime Aid
programme.desc: Michael helps Pam get a part time job at corporate so she can afford to go to art school. After the office gets robbed, Michael decides to hold an auction to raise money for all the items lost.

programme.title: The Office: Employee Transfer
programme.desc: Pam is embarrassed when she is the only person at the corporate office wearing a costume on Halloween. Holly and Michael take the long trip to Nashua after they get some shocking news. Meanwhile, Dwight torments Andy and tries to get under his skin.

programme.title: The Office: Customer Survey
programme.desc: Dwight and Jim are shocked when they get the results of the annual customer survey report. Pam and Jim decide they want to spend every minute together using their Bluetooth phones. Meanwhile Angela and Andy pick a location for their wedding.

programme.title: The Office: Business Trip
programme.desc: Michael is ecstatic when David Wallace decides to send him on a business trip to Canada. Andy and Oscar become unlikely friends when Michael decides to bring them along. Meanwhile Jim counts down the days until Pam gets back from art school.

programme.title: The Office: Frame Toby
programme.desc: A mysterious person in the office has made a huge mess in the microwave and will not clean it up. Meanwhile, Michael has to come to terms with the fact that there have been certain personnel changes in his staff without his knowing.

programme.title: The Office: The Surplus
programme.desc: Oscar informs Michael that the office must spend a $4300 surplus or lose it in next year's budget. When Michael opens up the floor for suggestions, factions break out and officemates square off against one another to get what they want.

programme.title: The Office: The Duel
programme.desc: The office is on eggshells because Andy still hasn't found out about Angela's affair with Dwight. When Michael spills the beans, Dwight and Andy take matters into their own hands. Meanwhile, Michael is nervous about his meeting with Wallace.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: Nov 10, 2020
programme.desc: GOP leaders back President Trump's refusal to concede to Joe Biden, Trevor breaks down the history of presidential concession speeches, and Lenny Kravitz discusses his book 'Let Love Rule.'

programme.title: The Office: Prince Family Paper
programme.desc: Michael and Dwight go undercover to do a bit of industrial espionage on a paper company competitor. Meanwhile, the rest of the office holds a debate to settle the question 'Is Hilary Swank hot?'

programme.title: South Park: Butters' Very Own Episode
programme.desc: Alone and lost, Butters determinedly makes his way through porn theatres and gay bath houses in an effort to get his dad back home in time to eat at Bennigan's for his parents' anniversary.

programme.title: South Park: I Should Have Never Gone Ziplining
programme.desc: The boys' ziplining adventure becomes a terrifying test of survival.

programme.title: South Park: Broadway Bro Down
programme.desc: After Randy takes Sharon to see a hit musical, he becomes Broadway's biggest fan.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go
programme.desc: Things go horribly wrong when Cartman plans to propel himself into the future. South Park Elementary School is facing strong opposition to the topic of evolution being taught to the fourth graders, especially from Mr. Garrison who must teach it.

programme.title: South Park: Go God Go XII
programme.desc: After freezing himself in an attempt to make his three-week wait for a Nintendo Wii pass quickly, Cartman lands himself over 500 years in the future. Stuck in a tumultuous place with warring factions and angry sea otters, Cartman fights to return home.

programme.title: South Park: Eek, a Penis!
programme.desc: While Ms. Garrison is off trying to find a way to become the man he was always intended to be, Cartman is put in charge of the classroom.

programme.title: South Park: The Last of the Meheecans
programme.desc: Cartman joins the U.S. Border Patrol.

programme.title: South Park: Pinewood Derby
programme.desc: Randy has a plan that will assure Stan a first place trophy in this year's Pinewood Derby. When they accidentally break warp speed, the town is visited and held hostage by an alien gangster.

programme.title: BoJack Horseman: Brrap Brrap Pew Pew
programme.desc: Diane's tweet lands Sextina Aquafina in hot water. Prankster and A-list actor Jurj Clooners gets under BoJack's skin.

programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Brain Health Special
programme.desc: Learning more about two diseases that affect the brain: glioblastoma and schizophrenia.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Wedding Date
programme.desc: Recently fired from her high-powered job, a woman returns to her small home town to attend the Christmas wedding of an old friend and faces old difficulties.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Proposal
programme.desc: A lawyer second-guesses his proposals to both his job and his fiancé while rekindling his love for an old flame.

programme.title: Movie: Always and Forever Christmas
programme.desc: A woman inherits a year-round Christmas store in a small town.

programme.title: Movie: Holiday Spin
programme.desc: A former dance champion is sidelined by an injury, but when his son comes to visit, the two of them start to prepare for a dance competition.

programme.title: Very Scary People: John Wayne Gacy: Evil Secret
programme.desc: This is the shocking and gruesome mystery of John Wayne Gacy, a popular Chicago businessman and part-time clown who was leading a double life in the 1970s. By day he was a community leader and by night a predator of young men.

programme.title: Very Scary People: NorCal Rapist: Phantom Predator
programme.desc: Wanted for multiple sex attacks against women in Northern California over three decades, this masked predator meticulously planned his assaults by studying the habits and routines of his female prey. After 27 years investigators finally close in.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Bag of Evidence
programme.desc: When a 9-year old girl disappears, an anonymous caller leads police to her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bound for Jail
programme.desc: When a woman is found dead in a ravine, police are stuck, as any evidence was washed away by storms. 20 years after the fact, an old hat and a tiny chip of metal put investigators back on the trail of a case long gone cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sphere of Influence
programme.desc: After a young girl disappears from a small town in a remote area of Alaska, police wonder if she'd been attacked by a bear or become lost in the woods. After her body is discovered with two gunshot wounds they realize the truth is much darker.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Death by a Salesman
programme.desc: Even though there were no witnesses, police manage to track down murderer less than 12 hours after the fact. Using fingerprints at the scene and security camera footage, officers arrested the perpetrator even though he was out of the state, on a bus.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Punch Line
programme.desc: A patient in a hospital emergency room says he cut his hand on a dumpster, but the doctor recognizes the injury as something else. That doctor became the chief witness in a crime involving the murder of a 67-year-old grandmother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sibling Rivalry
programme.desc: Two of America’s premier pornographers happen to be brothers. When one turns up dead, his brother confesses to shooting him. The question for investigators is whether the shooting was pre-meditated.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign Here
programme.desc: A young woman walked out of a department store, got into a rental car, and was never seen again. The signature on the rental car agreement turned out to be a forgery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shadow of a Doubt
programme.desc: An unknown assailant walked into a retail store and fired three shots, killing the owner. Police had suspects, but all of them had alibis.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tourist Trap
programme.desc: Bite marks lead the police to a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fire Dot Com
programme.desc: When a federal agency rules that a fire was intentionally set, the mother of the child killed in the suspicious fire was charged with murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Mistaken for Dead
programme.desc: A man dies unexpectedly in a doctor's office and the investigation is surprising.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers
programme.desc: Three young brothers are reported missing the day after Thanksgiving. In a shocking twist, their daddy claims he gave them to an underground group -- but investigators say his story doesn’t add up.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Amanda Knox
programme.desc: In 2007, Amanda Knox, an American exchange student living in Italy, was arrested and tried for the murder of her roommate. The evidence was shockingly graphic, but the DNA was inconclusive. A look at the case and where things stand today.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Andrea Yates
programme.desc: In 2001, Andrea Yates drowned her five small children in the bathtub of their Houston home. Her bizarre explanation was that she did it to save her children from Satan.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder on the Mountain
programme.desc: An entire family is brutally murdered in their home in California, with their eight-year-old son being the only survivor.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Web of Lies
programme.desc: The shooting of a newspaper carrier in rural Mississippi lands 20-year-old Marlon Howell on death row. Convicted on the word of two co-defendants and the identification of an eyewitness with a checkered past, Marlon maintains his innocence.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: D.C. Snipers
programme.desc: In 2002, a sniper terrorizes Washington D.C. and the surrounding suburbs, randomly targeting ordinary citizens. Ten are killed, three wounded.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Iowa vs Utah Pt 1
programme.desc: Teams Iowa and Utah face off in the final Wildcard Round for a shot at spot in Round 1 and the $20,000 prize.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Iowa vs Utah Pt 2
Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: NE vs Detroit Pt 1
programme.desc: Teams from Detroit and the Northeast go head-to-head in the first matchup of round 1. Rankin has a whole new group from the Northeast while Chucky Davis and his Detroit legends have an extra year of knowledge under their belt and are poised to win it all.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Full Throttle: NE vs Detroit Pt 2
programme.desc: With added scenes and bonus features: The Detroit-Northeast battle rages on and each team's leader is ready to face off to bring home a win.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Texas vs. Kentucky
programme.desc: Teams Kentucky and Texas finally get their chance to face off after weeks of smack talk, and both teams are pulling out all the stops to come out on top. Lizzy Musi returns to the streets to line up some grudge racing, and she's not the only one.

programme.title: Kaplan America: The Origin Story
programme.desc: Ken Kaplan is a motorcycle-flipping American patriot. This week Ken and his son race to get five bikes ready for auction and fight to track down and return three stolen bikes to their rightful owner.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Fastest in America: Texas vs. Kentucky
programme.desc: Teams Kentucky and Texas finally get their chance to face off after weeks of smack talk, and both teams are pulling out all the stops to come out on top. Lizzy Musi returns to the streets to line up some grudge racing, and she's not the only one.

programme.title: Kaplan America: The Origin Story
programme.desc: Ken Kaplan is a motorcycle-flipping American patriot. This week Ken and his son race to get five bikes ready for auction and fight to track down and return three stolen bikes to their rightful owner.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Double Proof Double Cross
programme.desc: Tickle takes on his first big run of outlaw shine in over six years, but a new still design throws a wrench in the works. Mark and Huck seek a buyer willing to pay more for less. Daniel recovers from an on-the-job injury only to find he's been replaced.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Enemy at the Gates
programme.desc: Teaming up with a former competitor, Mark and Digger sell their legacy shine in a neighbouring county. Mike and Jerry double their shine output only to find customers are getting their shine from another source. Mountain man Mark tracks an intruder.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Wedding Cake Shine
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt their first backwoods miracle, turning wedding cake into moonshine. Tickle scrambles for cover when aerial surveillance threatens a return to jail. And Appalachia's most accident-prone shiner is back operating heavy machinery.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Drone vs. Shotgun
programme.desc: Josh breaks into his secret stash to build a new still site, and breaks out his shotgun when a drone invades his airspace. Daniel hits the jackpot selling for Mark and Digger, while Mike finds his steady customers mysteriously less thirsty than usual.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Busted by the Law
programme.desc: Tim devises a plan to make backwoods shine with Tickle for the first time in years. Short on patience and a key ingredient, Mark and Digger's bootleg operation comes under threat. In a series first, two Tennessee shiners get busted by cops on camera.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Toxic Work Environment
programme.desc: Tickle's carpentry skills shine as Virginia outlaws plan a risky mod to their still. Mark and Digger take a big swing on a small ingredient that can't pass the sniff test. Josh digs deep and uncovers the worst way to foster a toxic work environment.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Tickle to the Rescue
programme.desc: Tickle answers the call when Josh needs help salvaging an abandoned submarine still and his season. Mark and Digger take on a specialty bourbon made from Indian corn. Facing jail time, Van and Ewok gamble their freedom for another run.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Run for the Hills
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt to rescue a former apprentice from a moonshine calamity. An unknown competitor invades Mike's turf, forcing him to change his shine strategy. Mark and Huck bank on backwoods survival skills to fuel their high-proof run.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Say Yes to the Mess
programme.desc: Tickle announces his engagement and Tim discovers why his best friend can't quit the outlaw side. Unable to sell any shine, Mike attempts a long-distance bootleg that puts him in the crosshairs of the law. Josh bets that Sin City needs one more vice.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Murphy's Law for Outlaws
programme.desc: Tickle and Tim put fire to their first backwoods run in a decade. With 250 gallons of mash on the brink of expiring, Mark and Digger torpedo their own operation. A minor oversight for Josh triggers a domino effect that threatens his entire site.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rolling Down the Mountain
programme.desc: A young outlaw with an old pot still earns an apprenticeship with Mark and Digger. Mountain man Mark tackles a week-long run to hit an $18K order that includes special delivery. In a desperate attempt to fix his worm barrel, Josh dives in headfirst.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Hemp Shine
programme.desc: Tickle and the Laws infuse anxiety-reducing CBD into their shine but the science is anything but stress-free. Josh digs into his secret stash to cure his subterranean blues. A mystery bootlegger dominates Mike's turf and it's about to get incendiary.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: A Family Divided
programme.desc: The Plath family has seen some major changes recently, they left the farm and moved into town, Micah and Moriah fled the nest, and Ethan and Olivia cut ties with Kim and Barry. Although they all live within a mile, the distance has never been so great.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: My Mystery Man
programme.desc: Micah reunites with model-friend Helena for a very hot and steamy modeling session. Barry and Isaac try to talk about the birds and the bees. Lydia reveals she has a secret crush, and Moriah goes on her first date ever.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: A Thrilla in Manila
programme.desc: A shocking secret about Royal and Angenette's relationship surfaces just as the family heads to the Philippines for their wedding. Meanwhile, in the Dominican Republic, Nicole braces herself for Lidia's reaction when her new boyfriend comes to visit.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: Loose Lips Sink Ships
programme.desc: As the family Chantel prepares for the Philippines wedding, Chantel and Pedro try to get to the bottom of Royal and Angenette's trust issues, and it leads to an explosive confrontation. Nicole hopes introducing Alejandro to her friends will go smoothly.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Happily Ever After?: EA Strikes Back!: Burnt Bridges and Bitter Truths
programme.desc: At a family dinner, Andrei spirals out of control. Jess confronts Colt about Vanessa. Karine gives Paul a final ultimatum. Asuelu's family turns on him. Larissa and Eric reopen Pandora's Box. Angela asks Michael to make a big decision.

programme.title: The Family Chantel: A Royal Mess
programme.desc: Royal explodes during a night out. With the wedding in jeopardy, the Family Chantel is left stunned and questioning Royal and Angenette's relationship. Nicole is furious with Alejandro when his friends reveal info about his past relationships.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Larry Returns
programme.desc: Theresa reads a young girl whose parents believe she may also possess the gift of communicating with those who have passed. It's an emotional family reunion when Theresa's ex-husband Larry returns to Long Island for Victoria's engagement party.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: Clearing the List
programme.desc: Reaching out to fans who've been on her mailing list for a decade, Theresa does a series of big group readings to clear her list. A man grieves as he wasn't able to save his dad, and two moms are reconnected to their children who took their own lives.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Cheetah Bride
programme.desc: Sabrina Bryan of 'The Cheetah Girls' has a dress-shopping date with designer Hayley Paige and one of Kleinfeld's own consultants is going to be a bride herself!

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Crazy Uncle Randy
programme.desc: Tracey's determined to find a black gown but mom says no and insists on calling in Tracey's fiancé to back her up in the fight for white! Randy's niece Danielle is getting married and the pressure is on her 'crazy uncle' to find her the perfect dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Y'All Are Trying to Please 11 Women
programme.desc: Kentucky grooms Justin and Bryant want their bridesmaids in completely different dresses, but what they think is a sophisticated wedding vision, looks more like a hot mess.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Eleganza Dahling
programme.desc: Plus-size bride Lela has her heart set on a mermaid gown, but her mother insists that she'll only look good in a figure flattering ball gown. Bride Jocelyn wants her bridesmaids to wear a beachy mid-drift, but her bridal party is very against it.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Amber and Amanda
programme.desc: Amber Flores feeds her family of six on $50 a week. Amanda tries to best her own couponing record.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Julie and Faatima
programme.desc: Julie has the chance to land her dream job: being paid to coupon for a sober home for teenage boys.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Chris and Antoinette
programme.desc: Chris tries to get 700 donation items for $0. Single mother Antoinette coupons to take care of her mother and daughter.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Joni and Angelique
programme.desc: Joni supports her family of nine along with her charities through couponing. Angelique stays up all night planning for her shopping trip.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: The Mess I've Created
programme.desc: Joyce's compulsive collecting almost cost her husband his life; Norine's hoarding forced her teenage daughter out of the house and threatens to destroy their relationship.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: You're Gonna Die in Here
programme.desc: Once a respected high school principal, Wayne's life changed when he was the target of a thwarted school shooting. Now paralyzed by PTSD and compulsive hoarding, Wayne has virtually barricaded himself inside his home and in turn has abandoned his family.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Stop Touching My Stuff!
programme.desc: For 16-year-old Haley, it takes less than a week to fill a bedroom. Her parents hope that a visit with an extreme hoarder who has lost everything will scare their daughter straight.

programme.title: Long Island Medium: On the Road: Texas
programme.desc: They say everything is bigger in Texas, and Theresa and Larry's trip there is no exception. Big surprises and big moments unfold as Theresa hits the road again to surprise fans with readings.

programme.title: Movie: Step Brothers
programme.desc: When their parents fall in love and decide to marry, two spoiled, middle-aged men who still live at home, are forced to grow up.

programme.title: Movie: Vacation
programme.desc: A grown-up Rusty Griswold takes his family on a surprise trip of a lifetime to Walley World in order to spice up his relationship with his wife and reconnect with his two sons.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Charlemagne Tha God
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek hosts this series in front of a studio audience where he presents the funniest viral videos that that he puts into different categories such as 'Redneck Good Times,' 'Worst Case Scenario,' 'What Happened Last Night' and more.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXCVII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo breakdown some 'breakaways', do 'anything but walking' and get 'life sync'd'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jimmy Uso and Naomi
programme.desc: WWE Superstars Jimmy Uso and Naomi learn sometimes Pain Don't Hurt, try to keep up with the old and fast in Silver Bullets, and prove that some things are In the Blood.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXII
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel babysit some 'prelinquents,' take a journey through the 'wild kingdumb' and grab a bit during 'slappy hour.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Freedia

programme.desc: This time, Darrell might be at risk of losing the title of 'The King of Montebello.' Brandi and Jarrod find their way back to the auction with the help of some pocket tech. Casey bails himself out despite being confined with an infectious German.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Tour de Van Nuys
programme.desc: The parking lot is tiny in Van Nuys, and Mary needs a little help managing it. Dave picks up a locker that turns out to be therapeutic, while Justin tries to show the rest of them how to make the most out of a unit.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Bo-ZAK That Whip
programme.desc: It's 'prison' hugs all around in the City of Orange. Brandi and Jarrod bring an old friend along to do the heavy lifting. Ivy finds his fun in the little things. Shana and Edwina crack themselves up with some snappy accessories.

programme.title: Storage Wars: We Don't Use the 'S' Word Around Here
programme.desc: Rolling into Buena Park with their crew, Brandi and Jarrod pick up what may be the best of the worst. Kenny and his cousin glide through a locker that's only half decent. Ivy comes to the auction dressed to kill. Mary tries to turn up the volume.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Talking in Cody
programme.desc: In Moreno Valley, Emily brings along her cowboy husband. Ivy is displeased at Mary’s fraternization with the auctioneer, and takes it out on her later.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Om Sweet Om
programme.desc: The Vegas Ladies show up in "Bourgie Brea," and find the place fascinating. Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine. Ivy and Dave go head-to-head on a giant pair of sister lockers.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Grandma's Havoc
programme.desc: In Victorville, Ivy takes it easy, letting Ivy Jr. run the operation. Kenny feels run down and his lack of focus lands him a locker, though there's a pleasant surprise in the end. Mary, Shana and Edwina just can’t seem to make anything stick.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Cloudy With a Chance of Profit
programme.desc: It's a momentous occasion in Van Nuys for Darrell, and he has a completely groovy time with it. Ivy starts his day off with an unwelcome bang. Brandi and Jarrod are left wondering whether their unit will bring clear skies or clouds ahead.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joke and Dagger
programme.desc: The guys crash a gallery opening where their antics aren't appreciated, they pass bizarre judgment on unsuspecting grocery shoppers, and the loser takes a spin on a terrifying wheel where one wrong move could have deadly consequences.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Swim Shady
programme.desc: Find out how long Q was 'sleeping' before the guys decided to have him stay asleep for 30 minutes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Cruisin' for a Bruisin'
programme.desc: The guys hit the seas for a special cruise episode. They turn the pool deck into a playground, give misinformation while posing as entertainment directors, and two Jokers get a double dose of torture in a two-part punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Brother of the Sisterhood
programme.desc: The guys play helpless oddballs in a waiting room, then ask grocery shoppers for cash. Then, tonight's loser becomes the number one enemy of women everywhere.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Flatfoot the Pirate
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr explain why they've been doused with water at the mall, and tonight's big loser plays a pirate but won't find any rum in his cup.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: The Bradshaw Bunch: Three Daughters, Three Solutions

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Father's Day
programme.desc: It's Father's Day and the kids try and plan a day for dad, but their bright idea of going to an amusement park backfires, as Todd's competitive side turns their planned day of fun into an all-out competition.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Confessions of a Beauty Queen
programme.desc: With Savannah and Chase leaving the nest in the next few years, Todd and Julie decide it's time to downsize.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase Turns 18
programme.desc: After 18 years of counting down the days, Chase is finally 18! When he tells Todd that he will no longer follow the house rules such as a curfew, Todd decides it’s time to give his son a dose of reality and show him what it’s really like to be an adult.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Anger Management
programme.desc: Todd blames his family for his stress when his doctor tells him that he has high blood pressure. Savannah gives Todd more bad news. Nothing works until Todd finds his own way to relieve his stress, leaving the kids running for cover.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: California Chrisleys
programme.desc: The Chrisleys venture to LA for their regular Beverly Hills haircuts, and for what Todd hopes will be a relaxing family vacation. His plans and sanity are threatened by new levels of Chrisley family craziness when Savannah does something drastic.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Workin' for a Livin'
programme.desc: After Todd unknowingly foots the bill for an extravagant lunch, he wants Chase and Savannah to learn that money doesn't grow on trees. Forced to get summer jobs, the kids struggle to face the reality of a hard day's work for the first time.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Todd and Chase are forced to experience the great outdoors when Grayson insists on going camping. While the guys 'rough it' in a luxury RV and terrify Grayson with stories of a haunted lake, Savannah and Julie must go back to driving school.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Marriage Redux
programme.desc: Todd and Julie want to avoid a marriage rut when the kids go to college, so they look for new ways to reconnect and put the spark back in their relationship.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: The Houseguest From Hell
programme.desc: Todd's home life is turned upside down when Julie’s pregnant and very demanding friend comes over to stay a few days. Also, Todd tries to bridge the gap between himself and his oldest daughter Lindsie.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Still Chrisley After All These Years
programme.desc: Julie and Todd decide to celebrate their wedding anniversary by throwing a charity event to raise money for breast cancer. When someone mixes up the dates, however, it’s a mad scramble to try to pull off the biggest party of the year.

programme.title: Nightly Pop
programme.desc: A topical pop culture talk show.

programme.desc: Native Aussie Dan is looking for a wealthy sugar daddy, but young fitness enthusiast Diego might change his mind at a furry alpaca farm.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: Bougie blonde Asia and white rapper Cameron try to build sand castles and a solid relationship foundation at the beach, but Cameron's quirks rub Asia the wrong way. Avise and Franklin survive a sub-zero cryotherapy freezing session.

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Love on Crop Top

programme.title: Dating: No Filter: Extra Cheese, Please

programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Mean Girls
