programme.title: True Hollywood Story: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: A look at the adolescent turbulence, from peer pressure and clique envy to the dating merry go 'round of the young ensemble cast, inside the Saturday morning series.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Rumor Has It
programme.desc: Kris is furious when some slanderous rumors circulate on the 25th anniversary of her best friend's murder. Kim struggles to disconnect from work while on a trip to Costa Rica for her daughter's birthday.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Hard Candy

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Gifted
programme.desc: When Tristan starts showering Khloe with gifts, she worries his grand gestures are an effort to win her back. After Kim and Kourtney learn that people are being sickened by toxic waste in a nearby community, they vow to help.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Hard Choices
programme.desc: Heimo is desperate to get a moose for winter. Charlie and Tyler have to overcome fire damage on their traplines.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Never Gets Easier
programme.desc: With no meat for winter, Heimo's desperate to run his trapline, but has no choice but to hunt for moose. Tyler's plan to run his sled dog team is threatened when the pack turns on each other.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Biting Back
programme.desc: Heimo tests his trapping skills on both land and water to outsmart one of his favorite catches, beaver. Scott puts lessons learned to the test as he tracks marten. Tyler's plan to run his sled dog team is threatened when the pack turns on each other.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Laying Down Their Legacy
programme.desc: Scrambling to finish trapping season, Heimo discovers the best catch of the season: a wolf. Charlie walks a legend's footsteps as he works the traplines Bob left to him. Tyler takes on the challenge of getting their hunting cabin ready for next season.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Caution: Predator Lurking
programme.desc: In order to avoid igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys overhaul a man's faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel. When moose threaten a mother and daughters' homestead, the Raneys are determined to ensure their safety.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End XL: From Ordinary to Outrageous
programme.desc: In Florida, Lucas Congdon and his crew are put the ultimate test. Together they transform an ordinary outdoor space into an epic backyard and build not one, but two pools with a sky-high spa, a theme park size slide and more.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Survival Shelter: Caution: Predator Lurking
programme.desc: In order to avoid igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys overhaul a man's faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel. When moose threaten a mother and daughters' homestead, the Raneys are determined to ensure their safety.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off The Deep End XL: Waterpark Pool Party
programme.desc: Lucas and his team build two pools to maximize the fun. One is a waterpark inspired pool party and the other is inspired by a relaxing resort atmosphere.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: In Hot Water
programme.desc: After ten years of saving and dreaming for a pool, a couple wants Lucas to build the wow factor. The crew creates a giant double-pool feature with a connecting stream and several customized surprises to deliver the 'wow' and dismiss any doubt.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Slimy Is the New Fuzzy
programme.desc: The Georgia Aquarium sends a team to Cape Town, South Africa to help rehabilitate and release a group of African penguins into the wild. A dive team installs a shipwreck feature into the Ocean Voyager exhibit to provide an enrichment for their sea turtle.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Seal the Deal
programme.desc: Two African penguins, Freya and Neo, welcome a young chick, but there's cause for concern when health problems arise. Staff work to train a trio of harbor seals to ride the elevator, with the only hiccup being a nervous seal named Floyd.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Otter Tale
programme.desc: Beloved Asian small-clawed otter Pinkie has a recurring bloody nose, and the team goes to great lengths to find out what could be causing it. Feisty baby American alligators arrive at the aquarium and must learn to eat in an orderly way.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Ready for the Jelly
programme.desc: A sweet beluga whale trains with staff to go on the 'whale scale.' Blacktip reef shark L2 is not eating normally and staff work to figure out why. See the first sea lion born at the aquarium.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Toddler Sea Lion Scarlett
programme.desc: A southern sea otter is rushed to the health center. The team travels to Key Largo to help coral restoration efforts. Young African penguins prepare for an upcoming event. Love is in the air for a trainer and his favorite sea lion pup, Scarlett.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Coral Super Bowl
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Zola, the beloved African penguin falls mysteriously ill. Later, the aquarium witnesses the annual spawning of an endangered coral species, while Maggie the False Map turtle has a date with the dentist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Bacon and Tomato's Big Adventure
programme.desc: The staff becomes concerned when Jupiter, the rescued sea lion is not himself. The Ocean Voyager exhibit awaits its new residents: black-blotched Fantail stingray siblings, Bacon and Tomato, and Shelley the shy box turtle makes friends.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Is Beautiful
programme.desc: After eating all his tank mate’s food, Tank the hungry sea turtle finds a space to eat in peace. Two beluga whales are welcomed to their new home at the aquarium, and Scarlett the lovable sea lion turns two.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Dinner for 20,000
programme.desc: Discover how the Georgia Aquarium feeds its marine and wildlife. It takes over 15,000 pounds of seafood to satisfy every creature, from the two-inch 'spitting' archerfish, up to the 25-foot whale sharks.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Big Momma's Surprise
programme.desc: A sea lion called Finn has tummy trouble and the team feeds him a snack that will help them investigate why. Big Mama the guitarfish may be living up to her name, and the boa-duo Ripley and Ridley receive a new home.

programme.title: Movie: We Belong Together
programme.desc: An obessed woman goes to terrifying lengths to keep a man from re-uniting with his former wife.

programme.title: Movie: Sleepless
programme.desc: A dirty police detective's secret life is exposed when he and his partner steal cocaine from a powerful and ruthless drug lord. They kidnap his son and Vincent is forced to search for him while evading internal affairs. He risks everything for his family.

programme.title: Movie: Tyler Perry's Temptation: Confessions of a Marriage Counselor
programme.desc: A married woman's life is changed forever when a handsome billionaire comes into her life and she gives into temptation.

programme.title: Martin: The Bodyguard

programme.title: Martin: Green Card

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Fat and Wet

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Another Bad Thanksgiving

programme.title: Martin: You're All I Need
programme.desc: When Martin flirts with a producer's wife, Gina becomes jealous and fights back.

programme.title: House of Payne: Lost and Found

programme.title: Black-ish: Old Digger

programme.title: Black-ish: Keeping Up With the Johnsons
programme.desc: After a month of heavy spending, Dre and Bow start to question if they are living too large and try to become more financially responsible.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sink or Swim

programme.desc: Jin's murder investigation moves forward and Voight is under close watch by Internal Affairs, but is still in complete command of his unit.

programme.desc: Intelligence begins to look into a string of murders where the victims have a dollar bill pinned to their chests. Thanks to some digging by Ruzek, Voight learns this friend was involved in some shady business dealings.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: The Weigh Station
programme.desc: The bounty on Halstead's head becomes a serious reality as an innocent bartender takes a bullet meant for him. Olinsky tries to reason with Bembenek to call off the hit, while Voight and his team search for the hired assassin.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Chicken, Dynamite, Chainsaw
programme.desc: Two teenage girls have gone missing, and the team knows the clock is ticking to find them. Halstead, Antonio and Lindsay investigate a tenement that gives them a much needed lead. Voight brings the father of one of the girls in to get some honest answers.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: An Honest Woman
programme.desc: While trying to help out Olive, Voight is attacked and kidnapped. When he does not show up for work, the team gets suspicious and begins investigating. Ruzek and Atwater prove they do belong on the team when they find a lead.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Prison Ball
programme.desc: The team goes undercover in a prison to gather information on the murder of a young girl.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: They'll Have to Go Through Me
programme.desc: The final part of the crossover event finds our intelligence unit joined by detectives from the SVU to help solve the pedophile case. Ruzek and Amaro, along with Halstead and Antonio continue to hunt for the link to foster care and child trafficking.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Albatross
programme.desc: When a respected judge is killed during a re-creation of a famous duel, detectives question his duelling partner.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: World's Fair
programme.desc: A young Pakistani woman is found murdered and detectives investigate to determine whether the killing was racially motivated.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Rocket Man
programme.desc: Commander Luke Nelson and Lieutenant Jessica Hart arrive in New York to promote an upcoming shuttle launch. When Hart is murdered, Goren and Eames are on the case. They question an ex-boyfriend who was jealous of Hart's success.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Under a Full Moon
programme.desc: A Las Vegas cocktail waitress and loving mother is murdered in her home, leading authorities to wonder if there was a predator at large. When detectives find the killer, it is clear that their investigation is just getting started.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Face Of Evil
programme.desc: The fire department responds to an apartment fire. Inside they find the body of 21-year-old Carolyn Casey. The investigation into what happened to this bright, young woman leads investigators down a dark path to a serial killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Interrogation
programme.desc: A young mother and her son are found dead in a house fire. Police suspected foul play. A confession led to a guilty verdict, but what really happened during the interrogation. This is an extraordinary look inside the interview room.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Deed
programme.desc: It was a sprawling southern family farm run by a former church deacon and his wife, who would want the beloved couple dead. Police followed the clues into a family feud, exposing ugly secrets but unmasking the murderer would be more complicated.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Nailah Franklin was building the life she'd always dreamed of, a thriving career and a handsome boyfriend. Then, she vanished. A trail of clues led detectives to an exclusive neighborhood but could those clues lead them to Nailah.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Hometown Hero & the Homecoming Queen
programme.desc: Dave Laut won a bronze medal at the 1984 Olympics. California is where Dave grew up, met his wife Jane and lost his life. Jane said it was a prowler but Dave was found dead outside, and a gun was found outside.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: Re-enactments of stories in which viewers participate to help solve cases.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: Some say Elvis Presley died of a heart attack on August 16, 1977. Elvis' stepbrother and others in his entourage believe he intentionally hoarded an array of dangerous drugs and purposefully committed suicide.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Yager Shyster
programme.desc: An update to the whereabouts of convicted murderer and counter culture hero Ira Einhorn, who, while released on bail, fled the country.

programme.title: Unsolved Mysteries: Tupac Shakur/ Big Foot
programme.desc: A Texas rapist; an armored-car robbery in Minnesota; the murders of Jodie Bordeaux and her unborn child.

programme.title: Movie: Split
programme.desc: Kevin, a man suffering from dissociative identity disorder, has 23 personalities inside his head. A 24th starts to break free and compels him to kidnap three girls. Unaware of their fate, the girls will have to use his different personalities to escape.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Day the Violence Died
programme.desc: Bart helps a homeless man prove he was the rightful creator of Itchy and Scratchy. But when the man is awarded damages in court, the Itchy and Scratchy studios have to close for good.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Fish Called Selma
programme.desc: Actor Troy McClure takes Selma out on a date in return for passing his eye test at the DMV. His sagging career is suddenly given a boost when he is seen in public with Selma, leading to marriage for both.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart on the Road
programme.desc: With a fake ID in hand, Bart, Nelson, Martin and Milhouse rent a car to visit the World's Fair in Knoxville, Tennessee. When they get stranded, Bart gets help from Lisa, who is spending her vacation with Homer at the power plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Curse of the Flying Hellfish
programme.desc: Abe enlists Bart's help to stop Mr. Burns' plot to steal a legacy of art treasures from their platoon days during the Second World War.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerpalooza
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with trying to appear 'cool' in front of his kids and their friends. While attending the Lollapalooza music festival, Homer inadvertently becomes a popular sideshow act when he gets hit in the stomach by a cannonball.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Summer of 4 Ft. 2
programme.desc: The Simpsons are off for a summer vacation at a beach house, but Lisa is worried about not having any friends to bring along. Lisa re-invents herself and quickly befriends local kids, causing a jealous Bart to sabotage her new friendships.

programme.title: The Simpsons: You Only Move Twice
programme.desc: Homer moves the family to a new town after he receives another job offer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Homer They Fall
programme.desc: Moe sees that Homer can absorb massive blows to the head and decides to turn him into a boxer. Despite being a terrible boxer, the resilient Homer is soon pitted against a former heavyweight champion that has just been released from prison.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Burns Baby Burns
programme.desc: While returning from an apple mill, the family picks up a hitchhiker and discover that he is Mr. Burns' illegitimate son, Larry. When Mr. Burns can't stand Larry's obnoxious ways, Homer tries to stage a fake kidnapping to unite father and son.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart After Dark
programme.desc: As punishment for destroying private property, Homer insists Bart works for the homeowner to pay off the damages. He soon discovers the house is actually a burlesque parlour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Milhouse Divided
programme.desc: Marge decides to hold a dinner party with other married couples. As the party winds down, Milhouse's parents get into a huge argument and decide to divorce, causing Homer to worry that his own marriage may be in jeopardy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hurricane Neddy
programme.desc: A hurricane comes through Springfield and spares everyone but the Flanders home. After thieves loot Ned's store and his rebuilt home crumbles to the ground, Ned suffers a nervous breakdown and checks into an asylum.

programme.desc: Cesar helps three more pets and their frustrated owners. A Labrador mix with etiquette issues and a Jack Russell terrier who thinks he can take on a Queensland heeler any day of the week.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Pop Star Fallout
programme.desc: With a new baby on the way, pop star Ashlee Simpson-Wentz and "Fall Out Boy" Pete Wentz enlist Cesar's help with their aggressive dogs.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Cesar Goes to Las Vegas
programme.desc: Usually Cirque du Soleil doesn't need Cesar's help, but several of the performer's animals are in trouble.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Terrible Tobi
programme.desc: Featuring a sheepdog/collie mix with an aggressive temperament.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Secrets and Lies
programme.desc: Jody, a Lhasa Apso, cannot keep her mouth off of anything. From tissues to money, she is the dog who ate your homework and then some.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: It's Raining Hen
programme.desc: Popeye the therapy rabbit comes into Pol Clinic with overgrown teeth but leaves with a couple of dates when his owner, Jodi, persuades Dr. Pol to donate dinner with himself and Diane for a fundraiser.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Ruff Day at the Office
programme.desc: It’s ready, set, VET as Dr. Pol and the other vets race to take on emergency after emergency in one frantic Friday.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Chubby Bunny
programme.desc: The Pol Clinic is packed to the gills with a mini-pig, giant bunny, pregnant dog and a busted hen.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Mob Rule
programme.desc: On the fierce battlegrounds of Botswana, being in a gang is a matter of life or death.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Lost Treasure of the Templars
programme.desc: The Knights Templar may have discovered a great treasure in Jerusalem and brought it back to Europe to become more powerful than the Pope itself. We try to solve the mystery of why this treasure disappeared.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Dead Sea Scrolls Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigated the Dead Sea Scrolls, which have been kept top-secret for decades by the Vatican. These could reveal the location of tunnel holding billions of dollars of treasure.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secret Societies: Mystery and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Experts investigate if there's any truth to conspiracy theories that allege secret societies control the course of world history from behind-the scenes, and if true, new discoveries might finally reveal the extent of their global domination.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: Monster of the Cosmos
programme.desc: Celestial giants with ferocious, cannibalistic appetites, black holes are the most-mysterious force in the cosmos, but new studies reveal how these star-devouring objects are actually the master architects of the universe as we know it.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Black Holes: The Secret Origin
programme.desc: Recent discoveries could explain how supermassive black holes grow so big, one of the universe's most mysterious questions. Neither dark matter nor cannibalism can fully explain these monsters, but the latest science might finally provide an answer.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Are Black Holes Real?
programme.desc: New discoveries challenge everything we know about black holes, and astronomers question if they even exist; the latest science tries to explain how they work and what they look like.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monster Black Hole
programme.desc: Black holes are the least understood places in the universe, where the rules of physics collapse. We go inside the supermassive black hole in the center of the Milky Way to uncover terrifying secrets about parallel universes, wormholes, and space-time.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: How Black Holes Made Us
programme.desc: New discoveries reveal that Black holes might have been essential to creating stars, giving light, and building the universe itself, and aren't the violent monsters we think they are.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: The Moon's Strange Secret
programme.desc: The last humans to walk on the moon discover something strange on the lunar surface. A NASA scientist investigates a strange phenomenon responsible for horrific mass deaths. A landmark NASA mission threatens to destroy the reputation of an American hero.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Rise of the Planet Killer
programme.desc: A mission to Mars captures an image of a strange structure on the Red Planet. Files from the first Apollo mission record an eerie sighting on the dark side of the moon. A planet-eating star gives scientists a glimpse of Earth's terrible demise.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens in the Amazon
programme.desc: After Neil Armstrong's moonwalk, he led an expedition into the Amazon to find a legendary library that holds all knowledge of an advanced alien civilization. Experts ask if a close encounter on the moon's surface inspired Armstrong's mysterious quest.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Saturn's Moon Monsters
programme.desc: When NASA discovers something strange on Saturn's biggest moon, experts investigate if aliens feeding on the world's electric atmosphere could be the culprit. The disturbing evidence points to a grisly apocalypse if these monsters ever make it to Earth.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Did Aliens Nuke Mars?
programme.desc: Experts investigate if an extraterrestrial Armageddon transformed Mars into the wasteland we know today, after a strange discovery by the Curiosity rover suggests the Red Planet was home to an alien nuclear war 300 million years ago.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Blood in the Garden of Eden
programme.desc: A site that could be the Garden of Eden hides a deadly secret. When a gateway to hell suddenly opens, experts investigate where it leads. A mysterious shipwreck could be an infamous Soviet KGB pirate ship.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Island of Alien Ooze
programme.desc: Satellite images capture a volcanic island that suddenly appears in the Pacific Ocean, and when NASA scientists arrive to investigate, they are baffled to find its home to a primordial slime and zombie creatures with origins in outer space.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mayan Armageddon: The New Evidence
programme.desc: New evidence might reveal how the Mayans vanished. When scientists investigate an abandoned settlement, they discover traces of ritualistic drug binges from the ancient world. A mysterious symbol in the desert points to a sex cult of millionaires.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Ship of Hell Island
programme.desc: A ghost ship is found abandoned on a remote island that's home to one of the world's last uncontacted tribes. A strange labyrinth in Sicily might have a sinister connection to the Mafia. New evidence reveals a mysterious military compound in Russia.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Evidence of a mysterious 5,000-year-old structure suddenly appears in Ireland. A top-secret machine that can see back in time. A satanic pentagram in the snow that points to witchcraft in the New World.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Americas' Lost Romans
programme.desc: The remains of an abandoned settlement high in the mountains of Peru could be an ancient Roman village, leaving experts to speculate if the Romans visited the Americas centuries before Columbus; if so, it could point to long-lost gold.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Hunting the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant in the hidden churches of Ethiopia; A great white shark is attacked by a mystery undersea predator; Strange shapes on the Italian countryside might be ghostly remnants of a wealthy Roman.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Beauty and the Beastly
programme.desc: Sometimes beauty can mask the ugliest of truths.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Dumped and Dangerous
programme.desc: When their love life goes sour these Deadly Women take lethal revenge. They are 'Dumped and Dangerous.'

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Blame Game
programme.desc: Some women can't admit their failings. They point the finger of blame at others.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Broken Ties
programme.desc: These Deadly Women brutally turned on family and in-laws.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Cling 'Til Death
programme.desc: These Deadly Women won't let their men go.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Old River Road
programme.desc: A hit-and-run accident looks suspiciously like murder after police discover evidence of blunt force trauma and interview two sisters who can't keep a secret.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Blood Is Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: When the bond between twin brothers proves stronger than the one between a husband and wife, true love takes a tragic, deadly turn.

programme.title: Betrayed: Killing with Kindness
programme.desc: Kind-hearted cashier Elizabeth Grosskopf scoops up human strays like puppies until one wants more than just food and shelter, but also her life.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Old River Road
programme.desc: A hit-and-run accident looks suspiciously like murder after police discover evidence of blunt force trauma and interview two sisters who can't keep a secret.

programme.title: 'Til Death Do Us Part: Blood Is Thicker Than Water
programme.desc: When the bond between twin brothers proves stronger than the one between a husband and wife, true love takes a tragic, deadly turn.

programme.title: Betrayed: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: After Marilyn Reza, a church-going mother of two is found dead in her home, investigators turn their attention to the members of her local church. However, a secret confession at her funeral brings the true murderer to light.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Beauty and the Beastly
programme.desc: Sometimes beauty can mask the ugliest of truths.

programme.title: Diabolical: Mother of All Lies
programme.desc: In 2015, Detective Scott Sanderson finds himself solving one of the strangest cases of his career. At its center are a newborn and her missing mother. Before long he'll uncover a diabolical scheme that will destroy the lives of everyone it touches.

programme.title: Diabolical: Living Off the Dead
programme.desc: George Kalomeris is a family man who looks after the less fortunate in his community. But after a dying man fingers George as the gunman, police discovera monster more diabolical than anyone could ever imagine possible. ...and he's not acting alone.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: High School Homicide
programme.desc: Kathy Chou is a typical 19-year-old, living in the Seattle suburb of Renton, Washington. When the bubbly high school senior goes missing, her friends search for her while detectives delve into her past relationships and even her own family history.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Lieutenant of Lampson Road
programme.desc: When a firefighter is gunned down in his driveway, everyone in his life becomes a prime suspect.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Maine Murder Mystery
programme.desc: Mike and Valerie Miller are a beloved couple in the tiny town of Webster Plantation, Maine. When they are found shot dead in their own home, authorities must probe a list of suspects that includes their own flesh and blood.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Thanksgiving Ambush
programme.desc: Rob and Brenda Andrew are a devout couple, living in the Bible Belt of Oklahoma City. But their world is shattered when both of them are shot during a violent home invasion. The mastermind will prove to be closer than anyone ever imagined.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: Nightmare on Oak Hollow Drive
programme.desc: Etta Jean Westbrook is a long-time resident in a quiet suburb in Bryan, Texas. When she is found dead inside her home, detectives question her loved ones and canvass the neighbourhood in order to catch the killer before they strike again.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Local Girl Gone
programme.desc: A high school freshman disappears. As hours turn to days, her family and town residents wonder if a killer is in the midst.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: This Just In
programme.desc: After college co-ed Jessica O'Grady vanishes late one night after leaving to see her boyfriend, locals are left to wonder if she was kidnapped.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Unsafe Anywhere
programme.desc: 21 year old Joel Larson is shot to death in a safe haven community for gay people in 1990's Minneapolis. Two more shootings terrorize the community as they realize a serial killer in disguise lives among them.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: Have you Seen Me?
programme.desc: Debora Gail Moody vanished into thin air from her home in Ludowici Georgia. A decade passes in her case with no answers, but her family persisted by posting billboards all around town. Eleven years later, a confession reveals the chilling details.

programme.title: Hometown Homicide: I Will Find You
programme.desc: 19-year-old Ali Kemp was at a pool in Leawood, Kansas in June 2002 when her father found her body in the pool's pump room. News reports and interviews with investigators and family tell the story of a father's quest to find his daughter's killer.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Hitler's British Headquarters
programme.desc: In this episode, Guy looks at the Nazi plans for Britain. From pre-war spying, concentration camps on British soil, to national landmarks earmarked by Hitler for his own use.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Transporting the Reich
programme.desc: At look at how Hitler's redesign of the German transport system was a key factor in his preparations for war, including how he used the car industry for the rearmament of his military and see his plans for a colossal rail system.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Red Sun Rampant
programme.desc: On December 7th 1941, WWII changed dramatically as Japanese planes swooped in for a surprise attack on the U.S. Pacific Fleet in Pearl Harbour. A conflict that had been fought almost entirely in Europe was now to be fought worldwide.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Closing the Ring
programme.desc: By late summer 1944, the Allied forces in north-west Europe were thrusting towards the German border. Paris and Antwerp were liberated, but then supply problems brought the advance to a halt. Meanwhile, Stalin had halted his main thrust towards Berlin.

programme.title: Air Aces: Red Tails
programme.desc: Pressure from African-American activist groups pushed President Roosevelt to initiate a Blacks-only fighter pilot training program during WWII.

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Vincent Gigante
programme.desc: Under the disguise of mental illness, Vincent Gigante evaded the authorities and rose to become the most powerful mobster in New York.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Mob Cops
programme.desc: In the 1980's and 90's the mafia controls the New York criminal underworld. By the early 2000's, evidence surfaces that the mob has gone much further and has people inside the NYPD. Now a dedicated team of detectives must find out who are the Mob Cops.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dated Cabin Turned Retreat
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a dated and dysfunctional cabin in Belgrade Lakes, one of Maine's most desirable regions. They try to turn the cabin into the perfect family retreat with a budget of $40,000 and six weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Gathering Place
programme.desc: Chase and his team take on a project on McGrath Pond in Oakland, ME, that has been empty for 15 years. Stephanie bought this place from her father and promised him she would fix it up.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Off-The-Grid Renovation
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team renovate an off-the-grid hunting cabin deep in the woods of Oxford, ME. They have a budget of $20,000 and a time frame of six weeks. They face many challenges associated with building off-the-grid.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Retro-fit for the Whole Family
programme.desc: A couple found their own slice of heaven overlooking Lake Annabessacook, only to find out it needed more work than they could provide.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Dilapidated Island Cabin
programme.desc: Chase and his team tackle a 1930s dilapidated island cabin with major rot issues. They have a budget of $30,000 and six weeks to complete the project.

programme.title: The Vanilla Ice Project: Wrath of the Bath
programme.desc: Rob and the ninjas give the master bath a clean and serene upgrade with luxurious finishes. New marble floors, an elegant vanity and an all-glass shower make this a relaxation station fit for royalty.

programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Northeast Texas Turnaround
programme.desc: A Minnesota couple searches for a vacation home in Texas that reminds them of their home state. Their agent helps them find a lakefront property in northeast Texas that may be their dream home, but its current state requires quite a bit of TLC.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Wolf Lake Escape
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York. The properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Rework in Wisconsin
programme.desc: A couple finds a fixer-upper in Wisconsin that overlooks Lake Michigan and they're doing all the renovation work themselves. He's a contractor with experience renovating properties, and she's ready to join him and get her hands dirty.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Lake Country Lounging
programme.desc: A family finds a fixer-upper in Lake Country, Wisconsin, in hopes of turning it into a lakefront retreat with a boat dock. The house's outdated style and need for major repairs may break the budget, dashing their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Jackson Lake Remake
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy lives in Atlanta with a vacation home on Jackson Lake, Georgia. They find the ideal property for their blended family, including three kids, but face a growing renovation list on a tight budget.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Harris Job
programme.desc: Mike Harris and his girlfriend, Beth Solomon, want to update the dingy, old kitchen in their condo. Though neither of them have very much renovation experience they are determined to create a modern, hip space.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Dickman Job
programme.desc: Joe and Krystina Dickman just bought the perfect house in the perfect neighbourhood. The only problem is the house's ugly, yellow kitchen is far from perfect.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The King Job
programme.desc: Jen King and her sister, Jackie, set out to remodel Jen's disgusting, basement bathroom and they are confident that they can get it done. They start of strong but things take a turn for the worse, ending with a trip to the emergency room.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Burlingame Job
programme.desc: Rich and Raelynn Burlingame have decided to tackle their biggest renovation project yet. They demolish their current living room and put a new kitchen in its place.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Krenk Job
programme.desc: Jay and Sherri Krenk just bought a new home in the country and are ready to start renovating their new kitchen, so they can move in.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Zentz Job
programme.desc: Eric and Kara have found the perfect home, except for the ugly, dated kitchen. They have plants to modernize the place, but when they tear in, all their plans go out the window. Eric and Kara race to finish installing their kitchen.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Nyenbrink Job
programme.desc: David and Lindsey Nyenbrink want to replace their outdated, pink kitchen. They think it's going to be a piece of take, but the reality is it's a fight against the odds to get their kitchen completed in time.

programme.title: Renovation Realities: The Jenkins Job
programme.desc: Stories of the hard and sometimes crazy work that goes into home renovations.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Boise, ID
programme.desc: Casey Webb ventures to beautiful Boise, Idaho, for a sushi and soup challenge so diabolically spicy, it goes by the name of Demon's Delight.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Grand Rapids, MI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Grand Rapids, Michigan, where he takes on a five-pound tray loaded with chili dogs, French fries, beer-battered onion rings and a 20-ounce soda.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Sensational Seafood
programme.desc: Armed with a serious love of food and years of experience in the restaurant business, Casey Webb travels the country in search of America's most delicious dishes and ultimate eating challenges.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Athens
programme.desc: Athens is the birthplace of many culinary traditions, and Andrew explores the classics: from stuffed grape leaves and spanakopita to moussaka and real Greek yogurt, still made the way folks have done for generations.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Florence
programme.desc: Florence, Italy lives up to its artistic reputation even in its food. Andrew Zimmern explores the classics like the rare Florentine steak, thick ribollita soup, the original cappuccino and the world famous frozen dessert, gelato.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris
programme.desc: In the city of love, Andrew Zimmern explores the delicious delicacies of Paris, France; from the indulgent steak frites and the croque monsieur, to the baked croissant and baguette, to the sweet macaroons and savory crepes.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London
programme.desc: London, England, is a multicultural melting pot, and Andrew Zimmern explores the dishes that have stayed the test of time: from the traditional Sunday roast and Yorkshire pudding to the classic pies 'n' mash and fish 'n' chips.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tel Aviv
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern reveals Tel Aviv's most iconic eats, from falafel to hummus to shawarma.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Albuquerque
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Albuquerque's desert gems, from enchiladas to nut rolls.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Charleston, Sc
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Charleston, SC, and his first order of business is paying a visit to the queen of soul food. Then, he chows down on Gullah cuisine, a favorite among locals, and indulges in fresh seafood.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Reno
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Reno, NV, for a food scene that loves to entertain. He embraces Reno's small town pride as he savors homemade meatballs and ravioli, gets a taste of Basque culture and meets some forward-thinking chefs.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Delhi
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Delhi, India's capital and home to roughly 24 million people.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Cod
programme.desc: Andrew explores the treasures of Cape Cod's coastal cuisine. From fried clams to fresh-caught cod, clambakes to cranberry bog ice cream, the Massachusetts peninsula's culinary scene is cause for summertime celebration.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Bangkok: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Bangkok, Thailand, has so many culinary treasures, it deserves a second trip! From steamed whole bass to massaman curry, Andrew highlights the city's exotic flavors and meals that are meant to be shared.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Can't Eat Just One
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro dives into Hot Tamales and their addictive cinnamon snap, Nathan's irresistible chili cheese fries and finds out how Dum Dums lollipops got their name. Finally, he finds out about Annie Chun's flavor-packed Mini Wontons.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Savor the Flavor
programme.desc: Savor the flavor of some tasty treats, from Eli's scrumptious Bavarian Apple Tart to Necco's classic bite-size Mary Jane. Then, the mystery of the orange-colored, banana-flavored Circus Peanuts is solved.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Doctor's Note
programme.desc: Michael uncovers the truth behind America's most popular food remedies. Do carrots really improve our eyesight; can a bowl of chicken soup cure a stuffy nose.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: What's For Dessert
programme.desc: Michael McKean as we indulge in the best part of every meal: Dessert! From cake to pie to banana splits, our favorite desserts are baked with rich stories that have shaped America in extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Passports Please!
programme.desc: Michael McKean journeys around the food globe to find out where some of our most popular international dishes were really born.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Taste of War
programme.desc: Discover how some of history's most epic battles were decided by what we eat.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Breakfast
programme.desc: Michael McKean reveals the truth behind the most important meal of the day, breakfast.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Thanksgiving Winners
programme.desc: Michael McKean gives thanks for our favorite Thanksgiving grub. He uncovers whether the turkey or the country came first, how burnt marshmallows ended up on sweet potatoes and if a lawyer gave up his career to put cranberries in a can.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the most creative chefs in the U.S. to get their mouthwatering secrets for meaty celebrations that include whole hog barbecue, buffalo meatloaf and more.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Extreme
programme.desc: It's time to go big or go home with Roger Mooking as he explores the most extreme dishes. The featured chefs are creating the most jaw-dropping, spectacular dishes on the food scene.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Southwest Smoke Signals
programme.desc: The smoke signals of fiery feasts lure Roger Mooking to the Southwest, where his first stop is West Alley BBQ and Smokehouse in Chandler, Ariz. The hot spot specializes in Tennessee-style barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat Masters
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets two barbecue brainiacs who have mastered the art of marrying heat and meat to turn out top-notch barbecue. Pitmaster Christopher Prieto teaches students the science of smoking and seasoning meats at Prime Barbecue.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Getting Piggy With It
programme.desc: Roger Mooking goes hog-wild at two legendary barbecue restaurants located in America's Barbecue Belt. At A&R Bar-B-Que in Memphis, Roger helps owner Andrew Pillard load racks of St. Louis-style ribs into custom wood-fired pits.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire And Family
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the South to visit two family-run barbecue joints that have been passing down recipes and rigs for generations.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Meat In Full Swing
programme.desc: Roger Mooking meets up with a few culinary titans in Tennessee who are swinging for the fences with outrageous rigs. At Wedge Oak Farm in Lebanon, Tenn., he joins Chef Trey Cioccia, owner of Nashville's Black Rabbit, to set up the Burn Tower.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Raising the Heat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Lone Star State, where they're taking open-fire cooking to new culinary heights with unique rigs. In Fort Worth, Texas, chef and restaurateur Lou Lambert invites Roger to his ranch to slow-roast whole hogs over oak coals.

programme.desc: A by-the-book cop must learn to step out of the box when she assigned to escort the gregarious wife of a drug boss to testify against the head of a drug cartel. As they race through Texas, the women must flee crooked cops and gunmen alike.

programme.title: Movie: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent who has it all starts over with one client after a personal moral crisis.

programme.desc: While Drea, Shamicka and Shanna are thrilled to be in Hawaii without Jessica, her absence isn’t sitting right with Nicole. Mayte admits her relationship is in trouble and a game of Truth or Dare brings up Drea's painful past.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes

programme.desc: A Texas high school football team is led by a back-up quarterback and an iconic coach.

programme.title: Movie: Grease
programme.desc: A leather-jacketed boy and a goody-two-shoes girl fall in and out of love in the 1950s.

programme.title: Movie: Merry and Bright
programme.desc: Two people work together to make their candy-cane factory profitable, but in the end, it's their love that turns a profit.

programme.title: Movie: Write Before Christmas
programme.desc: A woman writes special Christmas cards to those who inspired her.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Tree Grows in Colorado
programme.desc: A woman is planning the town's Christmas celebration and must win over a firefighter in order to obtain his beautiful spruce for the tree lighting.

programme.title: Movie: Pride, Prejudice and Mistletoe
programme.desc: A career-driven woman finds her life turned upside down when she is forced to return to her hometown to care for her sick mother.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Duet
programme.desc: Famous for their beloved Christmas duet, fate brings ex-music duo together over the holidays, just in time for the annual Yuletide Festival.

programme.title: Movie: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: An accident between a sweet bookshop worker and a handsome stranger leaves him without his memory.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Homestead
programme.desc: A famous actress heads to a Christmas-obsessed town to film a movie, and is thrown for a loop when a romance brews between her and a local inn keeper, who's a single dad. As she gets a taste of small-town life, she discovers the true meaning of Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Joy
programme.desc: A woman must return to her hometown to care for her aunt during the Christmas break. While there, she meets a man and learns there is no place like home for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A pastry chef makes it to the final round of a renowned baking competition and finds herself asking her high school sweetheart for help. As they grow closer, she realizes the must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing a chance at love.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Candace Cameron Bure discusses her new movie 'If I Only Had Christmas,' plus, Lacey Chabert and Will Kemp talk about their new movie 'The Christmas Waltz.'

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Christmas
programme.desc: A woman is whisked away to Europe when her boyfriend reveals he's actually a prince.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Detour
programme.desc: Two NYC-bound travellers find themselves linked when a storm waylays their flight to an airport hotel in Buffalo. Desperate to get home in time for Christmas, a woman seeks help, in any form, to make a Christmas miracle happen.

programme.title: Tosh.0
programme.desc: Daniel Tosh discusses blogs and vlogs, popular sites and new technologies.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Crystal Light Dancers
programme.desc: Daniel web chats with Wii Fit girl and reunites the Crystal Light dancers after 23 years in the first ever Web Reunion.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Yotta Life
programme.desc: Daniel gets life lessons from a German party animal, delves into the video game industry and bids adieu to Cabin Couture.

programme.title: Tosh.0: High School Football Fan
programme.desc: Daniel profiles a unique high school football fan, upholds his record of being better than everyone else and proves that leaf blowers can be dangerous when used incorrectly.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Eli Porter
programme.desc: Daniel invades Arizona State University and tries to cram four years of college experiences into one day, rapper Eli Porter gets a web redemption and Daniel hosts a tweet-and-greet.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Super Bitch
programme.desc: Daniel meets Super Bitch, the world’s first black, gay superhero, and makes Halloween less of a nightmare for parents by teaching them how to terrify their kids.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Double Rainbow Guy
programme.desc: Daniel talks to his exact opposite, yells some ridiculous things and goes on a trip with the Double Rainbow Guy.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: Daniel gets some help from Dr. Pimple Popper and continues his domination of made-up world records.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Ostomy Bag Girl
programme.desc: Daniel invents some games that will give Parker Brothers a run for their money, shows you a Christmas card that is guaranteed to ruin Christmas, and America's sphincterless sweetheart gets a web redemption.

programme.title: Tosh.0: X12
programme.desc: Daniel celebrates Valentine's Day by letting viewers vent about how much they hate their significant other. After, the world's only black superhero gets a web redemption.

programme.title: Tosh.0: Tirdy Works
programme.desc: Daniel paints the town brown with a crafty turd burglar, outsources his bracket to Asia and demonstrates how to have some good, clean fun with a box cutter.

programme.title: Tosh.0
programme.desc: Daniel checks in with some musically challenged former guests to see how far they've fallen since being on the show, and reminisces about the unholy dumpster fire that was 2020.

programme.title: Tosh.0: ASMR Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The quiet queen of ASMR whispers sweet nothings, Daniel ends his media blackout and swears off nuts for November.

programme.title: South Park: Breast Cancer Show Ever

programme.desc: Kyle visits the dreaded school nurse, who suffers from Conjoined Twin Myslexia Disease. His reaction prompts the entire town to rally behind the nurse, singling her out to 'honour' her. Meanwhile, Pip leads the school dodgeball team to the championships.

programme.title: South Park: Hooked on Monkey Fonics

programme.desc: When Kenny meets with an unfortunate accident, Cartman lobbies to let Kenny die so he can get what Kenny left to him in Kenny's will. Meanwhile, Kenny is called upon to fight against the forces of Satan in heaven using his PSP skills.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland

programme.desc: Life Outreach International encourages the support of missions and relief programs around the world.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life

programme.title: Military Makeover: Operation Career
programme.desc: We're exploring leading companies who are changing the careers and lives of military veterans across the country.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Stars
programme.desc: After thinking she's finally got a shot at a record deal, the holiday season derails a young woman's dream.

programme.title: Movie: On Strike for Christmas
programme.desc: A mother goes on strike when all of her efforts for a perfect family Christmas get taken for granted. Chaos ensues when she convinces all the other neighbourhood mothers to join in, and the strike takes on a life of its own when the local news finds out.

programme.title: Movie: Dear Secret Santa
programme.desc: After breaking up with her boyfriend, a woman moves back into the house she grew up in, brining back memories of the boy next door who recently passed away. One day she receives a Christmas card from a secret admirer she believes to be the same boy.

programme.title: Movie: Homemade Christmas
programme.desc: Every year, an ambitious young woman uses the weeks leading up to Christmas to become the ultimate holiday freelance assistant for hire, helping with any Christmas related tasks for extra income.

programme.title: Crimes of the Century: Reagan Assassination Attempt
programme.desc: In 1981, a gunman fires six shots at Ronald Reagan. What follows is a chaotic rush to save Reagan's life, confusion at the White House, and an urgent investigation to find out if this is a wider plot, or the work of a lone assassin.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Two construction workers are brutally attacked in San Antonio, but one survives and is able to identify his assailant.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: A small-town electrician sits on Texas death row for the murder of a 19-year-old college student, but forensic science could exonerate him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Missing Pearl
programme.desc: A woman doesn't return home, but a trail of blood is discovered leading to a basement.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Man's Best Friend?
programme.desc: When a young girl was found dead, her parents told police that she was killed by a dog.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nailed
programme.desc: Just before she's scheduled to testify against her alleged rapist, a woman is murdered on her front lawn. 15 years later, investigators used new technology to finally catch the woman's killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sign of the Zodiac
programme.desc: A serial killer that admires the infamous Zodiac Killer prowls New York City's streets for six years, trying to kill one person for every zodiac sign. Police use a variety of forensic tools to arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Web of Seduction
programme.desc: When the scene of a murder proves to be completely bare of evidence, computer forensics experts manage to dig up files on the victim's computer, and those of his wife and her lover that finger a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grounds for Indictment
programme.desc: When police have trouble pinning a suspect to the scene of the crime in a deadly drive-by-shooting, even after investigating cell phone calls and shell casings, they turn to the dirt in the perpetrator's tires.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Missing Skelton Brothers
programme.desc: Three young brothers are reported missing the day after Thanksgiving. In a shocking twist, their daddy claims he gave them to an underground group -- but investigators say his story doesn’t add up.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Touching Recollection
programme.desc: An eighteen-year-old girl is abducted at gunpoint from her home in Jackson, Ohio. Fortunately the victim returns hours later, and police hope the tire impressions and shoe prints at the crime scene will enable them to find the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg to Stand On
programme.desc: Police investigate when a severed leg is found in the garbage. When they realize they can't use conventional techniques to catch the killer, police must use scientific techniques like DNA testing and toxicology reports to find him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold

programme.title: Friends: The One With the East German Laundry Detergent
programme.desc: Joey wants to get back together with a former girlfriend he dumped, so he tricks Monica into posing as his new gal pal. Ross helps Rachel, a laundry virgin, do her first load of wash. Chandler has a difficult time breaking up with his annoying girlfriend.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Butt
programme.desc: Joey gets his film break when he's hired to be Al Pacino's stunt butt. Chandler has second thoughts about a married woman who wants him to be her sex toy. Monica tries hard to prove to her friends that she really doesn't have an A-type personality.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Blackout
programme.desc: During a blackout, Chandler is trapped with a beautiful model and Rachel meets Paolo.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: Ross and Monica's grandmother dies; Ross falls into an open grave and hurts his back.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Underdog Gets Away
programme.desc: Joey gets a job on a health campaign and is shunned by his family when he advertises VD.

programme.title: Friends: The One With Mrs. Bing
programme.desc: Chandler's mother stirs up controversy when she kisses Ross; Rachel tries writing a novel.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Dozen Lasagnas
programme.desc: Monica is stuck with a dozen lasagnas; Paolo hits on Phoebe when he gets a massage.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the List
programme.desc: Chandler tries to help Ross choose between Rachel and Julie with a list of pros and cons.

programme.title: Mom: A Pirate, Three Frogs and a Prince
programme.desc: Roscoe's parent-teacher conference leaves Christy feeling threatened by Baxter's girlfriend, Candace. Also, Bonnie tries to get her dating mojo back by flirting with an unlikely target.

programme.title: Mom: Kreplach and a Tiny Tush
programme.desc: Christy hosts a family dinner for Violet's hard-to-please future mother-in-law. Also, Bonnie balks when Steve wants to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: Mom: Snickerdoodle and a Nip Slip
programme.desc: When Christy catches the eye of Candace's wealthy, charming father, Fred, Candace and Baxter are outraged, while Bonnie pushes Christy to give him a chance.

programme.title: Mom: My Little Pony and a Demerol Drip
programme.desc: Christy's burgeoning relationship with Fred gets more and more difficult for Candace to handle. However, Bonnie enjoys the perks of Christy dating a wealthy man.

programme.title: Full House: A Date With Fate
programme.desc: D.J. and Danny both go on dates and accidentally end up at the same restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Culture Shock/ F.U.N.
programme.desc: Bob tries to assist Squidward with the annual talent show; Plankton is lonely.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Nature Pants/ Opposite Day
programme.desc: SpongeBob quits his job for the jellyfish; Bob is convinced that it's Opposite Day.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue: Pups Save a Pterodactyl/ Pups and the Big Rumble
programme.desc: Maverick the daredevil Pterodactyl takes a tumble. A volcano is erupting, threatening the Dino Wilds.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save the Balloon Pups/ Pups Save the Spider Spies

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Royal Concert/ Pups Save the Princess' Pals
programme.desc: Luke Stars goes missing before his Royal Concert in Barkingburg, and Sweetie attempts to take over the concert. Animals are over running Barkingburg Castle while the Princess is away and it's up to Ryder and the PAW Patrol to get them under control.

PAW Patrol: Pups Save a Waiter-Bot/Pups Stop a Pie-Clone

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines: The Blaze Family
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ spend the day with Blaze's family. His Mom, Dad and little sister join Blaze in a race against Crusher.

programme.title: PAW Patrol: Pups Rescue Thanksgiving/ Pups Save a Windy Bay
programme.desc: The bouncy turkey has flown away. Later, a super-strong wind has suddenly swept up all the wind surfers.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Best Day Ever/ The Gift of Gum
programme.desc: Spongebob is going to have the best day ever, until all of his friends have problems; It's Best Friends Day, so Spongebob and Patrick trade Best Friend presents.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: High Sea Diving/ Bottle Burglars
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean. When SpongeBob Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it's up to them to steal it back.

programme.title: The Loud House: Tripped!

programme.title: The Loud House: Friended! With the Casagrandes

programme.title: The Casagrandes: Cursed!
programme.desc: Celebrity psychic Ernesto Estrella deems Great Lakes City to be bad luck and Abuela believes him.

programme.title: The Loud House: The Loudest Thanksgiving

programme.title: The Loud House: Don't You Fore-get About Me/ Tough Cookies
programme.desc: Hit by the realization that her big sister will be going off to college soon, Leni tries to thwart Lori's plans. Lincoln and Clyde start their own cookie-making business, but realize it's a lot more work than they realized.

programme.title: The Loud House: Strife of the Party/Kernel of Truth
programme.desc: When Lola learns that Lana is planning their joint birthday, she does everything to stop it. Lincoln and the Middle School Action News Team solve the mystery of the missing popcorn.

programme.title: The Loud House: Band Together/ Blinded by Science

programme.title: Storage Wars: Let's Give 'Em Something to Tonka About
programme.desc: Dave travels to Murietta and is hoping his competition won't want to purchase a large locker they have to move. Justin snags a decent locker. Ivy and Ivy Jr. have a therapeutic day. Mary locates a little treasure.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Fowl Play
programme.desc: The buyers travel to Torrance and Dave sees an increase in his profits. It's positive news when Mary discovers some clothes that don't fit. Kenny tries a be an early bird, but winds up becoming the dodo.

programme.title: Storage Wars: It's Bring Your Kids to Work Day
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi bring their kids to the auction during spring break. Meanwhile, Ivy hopes to stock up for his upcoming store auction and Darrel puts his 'Gambler' nickname to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Storage Wars: I Learned It From Watching You!
programme.desc: After hours in Huntington Beach brings out the family; Rene's daughter has a great eye; The Schulz/ Passantes add to their outdoor options; and the Gambler meets the predators.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Quality Bro Chime
programme.desc: It's 'Bring your Brother to Work Day' in Thousand Oaks. Justin sinks his money into a unit with an interesting pair. Dave pushes Mary to the breaking point. Kenny finds the time to make a nice profit, piece by piece.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Donut Effect
programme.desc: Darrell comes armed with donuts in an attempt to distract the competition with a sugar rush, while Jarrod and Brandi plan a four-year anniversary party for their Orange Store.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Oysters on the Half Plate

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Thrill of a Kitty and the Agony of Smoked Meat
programme.desc: Darrell tries to smoke the competition and proves that sometimes treasure can look like trash. Mary struggles to wrangle information from the more experienced buyers, but Rene is not looking to share first place in the hunt for the best locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars: The Mom Factor
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi are all about having fun as they try to dunk the competition. Darrell and Brandon hope to be on par with a victory, while Casey tries her hand at bidding. Ivy transforms his store into an auction house.

programme.desc: Darrell and Brandon look to instigate the other buyers and sneak through the melee. Rene brings his father, Gunter, to the auction, resulting in laughs and profits. Dave has his sights set on a big score. Ivy hits the auctions hard despite an injury.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Out of the Frying Pan Am

programme.desc: Ivy can't get enough from Montebello. Dave gets a taste of carnival fun. Jarrod and Brandi shred vintage style.

programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi find a very unusual piece of art that might leave them flush(ing). Rene and Casey enjoy a little vino.

programme.title: Storage Wars: Winner Winner Chicken Dinner
programme.desc: A buyer gambles on a locker that turns out to be anything but chicken feed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hump Day
programme.desc: The guys geek out while lending a hand to customers at a casual restaurant, then battle across the table of a focus group. Plus, tonight's big loser gets spitting mad when forced to spend some quality time at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fraudway

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Cattle Drive Me Crazy
programme.desc: Kris takes the family to Wyoming in an effort to ease recent tension and strengthen their bond, but her plan backfires when the girls start fighting on the trip. Kendall is excited to spend some much-needed bonding time with Kylie.

programme.desc: Carrie meets a jazzman to help her get over Big; Samantha crosses some boundaries.
