programme.desc: Charlotte's battle with her mother-in-law explodes; Samantha's relationship gets a boost.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Baby, Talk Is Cheap
programme.desc: Carrie is still crazy about Aidan and wants him back; Charlotte rethinks her baby plans.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Time and Punishment
programme.desc: Carrie frets about Aidan's ability to forgive her affair; Miranda discovers leisure.

programme.title: Sex and the City: My Motherboard, Myself
programme.desc: Carrie and Aidan exchange keys; Miranda strains to maintain her strong woman image.

programme.title: Sex and the City: Sex and the Country
programme.desc: Samantha joins Carrie at Aidan's cottage in the country where she meets a cute farmer.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Family Matters
programme.desc: When Kim reveals she no longer wants to host the annual Christmas Eve Party, the family feuds over holiday plans. Scott struggles to talk about his parents when reunited with a relative from his past. Khloe fills in as Kris' assistant and tension rises.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Growing Pains
programme.desc: While Khloe plans a baby shower for her best friend, Malika wrestles with the reality of becoming a single parent. Kourtney gets into cuddling and breakouts of her comfort zoom by forcing herself to be more affectionate.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Paris, Puppies and Pranks
programme.desc: As concerns begin to grow over the Coronavirus, Kim and Kourtney head to Paris for the Yeezy season 8 launch. Kris and Corey welcome a new puppy, and Khloé and Scott’s prank on Kris continues taking yet another turn.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Journey to Healing
programme.desc: Scott experiences some troubling health issues and Kim heads to Washington to meet with some formerly incarcerated women. Khloe is determined to cure Kim of her fear of spiders.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Trouble in Palm Springs
programme.desc: After months of tension among the sisters, Kris plans a getaway to Palm Springs for her daughters to bond, but a major fight between Kendall and Kylie derails the trip.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Sister, Sister and a Babymoon
programme.desc: Khloe takes her bestie on one last trip before her due date, but worries that some issues with Malika’s baby daddy might send her friend into early labor. The family deals with the fallout of Kendall and Kylie’s big fight in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Things Fall Apart: Covid-19
programme.desc: As L.A. prepares for a potential lockdown, Khloe falls ill and worries that she may have Covid-19. Malika goes into labor and cannot bring her support system to the hospital.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Losing it in Lockdown
programme.desc: Kim struggles to balance work life and mom life in quarantine, while Khloe gets creative to keep herself entertained. The family encourages Kendall and Kylie to reconcile after their argument in Palm Springs.

programme.title: Chopped: Knife Strife
programme.desc: The competition begins with a gory story in the appetizer round, when the chefs find blood sausages in the basket. Then, in a wild entree round, the chefs attempt very ambitious plans for a basket that includes a caramelized pudding and a pork product.

programme.title: Chopped: Best Laid Pans
programme.desc: A big setback leaves one chef unsure whether her sausage and okra appetizer will come together on time and as planned. Savory pie and a fresh Italian cheese meet on the chefs' entree plates.

programme.title: Chopped: Wonton Wonder
programme.desc: Four chefs have to get creative with wonton wrappers after finding lowbrow eclairs in the first basket. A can full of cheesy comfort food and a lean bird are on the entree agenda.

programme.title: Chopped: Thankful Siblings
programme.desc: Host Ted Allen and his sister, plus three judges and their siblings, crowd the kitchen for a wild Thanksgiving competition! These turkeys are sure to have a blast cooking together, starting round one by tackling a curious green bean creation.

programme.title: Chopped: Turkey Day Heroes
programme.desc: Four chefs who cook in soup kitchens come to the Chopped Kitchen to face off in this special competition. In the appetizer round, they get creative with some fun bread and orange sauce.

programme.title: Chopped: Comfort Food Feud: Mac and Cheese
programme.desc: The chefs try to conquer mac and cheese and claim a spot in the Comfort Food Feud grand finale. The first round basket includes a cocktail, and the entree round sees the competitors working with a mac and cheese-inspired brunch item.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: What Would Alex Make? Baby Food, Big Challenge
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli gets sandwiched between pork and baby food with a tough cart in the first challenge. Then she must find a way to make an indulgent dessert using low-calorie ice cream and margarine.

programme.title: Candy Land: On the Go
programme.desc: There's no mode of transportation in Candy Land, so host Kristin Chenoweth challenges the remaining teams to build an inventive way for the locals to get around. Judges Nacho Aguirre and Aarti Sequeira decide which team is transported home.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Chinese Family Faves
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making some tasty family favorites to celebrate a visit from her dad. The menu includes chicken pot stickers with dipping sauce, scallion pancakes with maple carrot slaw and green beans with her versatile magic sesame sauce.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Outdoor Movie Night
programme.desc: Molly Yeh makes some of her favorite munchies for an outdoor movie night on the farm. Her Nachos are piled high with BBQ Pulled Pork, and Radishes with Smoked Butter are a unique, crunchy combination. She assembles individual Candy Bar Salads for dessert.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Middle Italy
programme.desc: Molly Yeh's old band stops by the farm for a home-cooked meal. For her music-loving friends, Molly makes Orecchiette with broccolini and sausage, and a simple escarole salad with artichokes and tangy lemon dressing.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Family Thanksgiving
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving on the farm, and Molly Yeh is celebrating the best way she knows how, with lots of food! She makes creamy twice-baked potatoes, a hearty brussels sprout casserole, sweet and sticky orange marmalade glazed ham and a classic, pumpkin pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Lunch for the Crew
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is preparing a well-deserved lunch at the lodge for the cowboy crew. She makes a crispy-coated ranch favorite, chicken fried steak sliders piled on beautiful, warm buttermilk biscuits and served with buttermilk gravy.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: One Pan
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is focusing on quick and easy one-pan meals, starting with fresh and crunchy turkey taco lettuce wraps with Pico de Gallo.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Chuck's Dinner
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's focus is on Chuck, her father-in-law, as the family helps him work cattle and she makes him dinner.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Where's the Meat?
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is headed to the lodge to make a fabulous meat-free Tex Mex frittata, and she's sharing other epic meat-free meals, too.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Chicken
programme.desc: It's all about chicken as Ree Drummond whips up four speedy 16-minute meals. First, her Buffalo chicken burgers are perfect when time is short and hungry teenagers are waiting.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Other Cuts Of Beef
programme.desc: Ree's transforming random cuts of beef into four delicious dishes. She's turning stew beef into slow cooker Sunday stew and serving it with fabulous buttery parsley lemon noodles.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cooking Channel Cook-Off
programme.desc: Josh Elkin, Kelsey Nixon, Dan Pashman and Jazz Smollett are taking on Guy Fieri's twisted games. First, the chefs try to fit all the ingredients for their signature dish into the world's smallest grocery bags.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Cruisin' Through the Express Lane
programme.desc: A flip of the coin determines how four chefs must make their best dish using only ingredients from the even-numbered aisles. Next, chefs get to show off their culinary muscles with an international dish featuring items from the store's sample tables.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Produce and Cons
programme.desc: In the first game, the chefs are only allowed to shop in the middle aisles to make their vegetarian feast. Then, the chefs must master surf and turf on a budget.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Squeal of Dreams
programme.desc: Dr. Pol is fielding farm calls all over Isabella County now that the spring birthing season is in full swing.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Dog-a-POL-ooza
programme.desc: It’s all dogs all day this week at Pol Veterinary Services. Dogs are an incredibly important part of the Pols’ life, as both personal pets and clients. From unclaimed strays to nosey farm dogs, there’s no pup Dr. Pol and crew won’t treat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Back to the Suture
programme.desc: Follow veterinarian Dr. Jan Pol as he treats animals at his clinic in rural Michigan.

programme.title: What on Earth?: The King at Roswell
programme.desc: When a strange, red plane is discovered near the site of the Roswell UFO incident, experts wonder if the aircraft has Nazi or extraterrestrial origins, and their investigation reveals new secrets about one of America's most famous faces.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Zombietown USA
programme.desc: Satellite images capture evidence of an abandoned town hidden in the American wilderness, and as experts analyze this new evidence, they reveal what this strange place has to do with a top-secret military plan to battle an army of the undead.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome: City of Blood and Glory
programme.desc: The timeless icons of ancient Rome serve as monuments to prodigious power, cruel madness and the epic legends from the world's most-powerful empire. Archeologists use cutting-edge tech to reveal the hidden secrets of Rome's classic wonders.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome: City of Blood and Glory
programme.desc: The timeless icons of ancient Rome serve as monuments to prodigious power, cruel madness and the epic legends from the world's most-powerful empire. Archeologists use cutting-edge tech to reveal the hidden secrets of Rome's classic wonders.

programme.title: Unearthed: Vesuvius's Secret Victim
programme.desc: Scientists are using cutting edge technology to unearth a second city that, like the well-known city of Pompeii, was destroyed when Vesuvius erupted in 79 AD. This new town is revealed to be one of the most well-preserved Roman towns on earth.

programme.title: Unearthed: Pompeii's Evil Twin
programme.desc: The lost city of Baiae was the Las Vegas of the ancient world, until a mysterious calamity caused it to sink into the sea. New discoveries reveal the secrets of this sin city that, like Pompeii, some experts believe was destroyed by a supervolcano.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Oblivion Calling
programme.desc: An intercept pilot chases a UFO only to vanish forever, then, a mysterious hum plagues 2% of the planet.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Soviet Doomsday Warning
programme.desc: A Russian radio station has broadcast a signal nonstop since the Cold War, and no one knows why; experts use hi-tech methods to investigate what it is, and what might happen if it ever stops.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Alien Evidence: The Holy Grail
programme.desc: When a powerful radio beam originating from deep space is detected by experts on earth, some suspect its hard evidence of extraterrestrial life; new investigations into this shocking signal might reveal the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Curse of the Lost Cosmonaut
programme.desc: When two experts build their own radio-listening station to intercept the secret communications of American and Soviet astronauts, they capture traces of a haunting voice that may be a lost Russian cosmonaut. New, declassified evidence reveals the truth.

programme.title: Phantom Signals: Omen of the Pharaoh's Wail
programme.desc: At the tomb of one 3,000-year-old Egyptian pharaoh, experts report that the massive statues that guard the site can sing; using cutting-edge technology, investigators hunt for an explanation for this mysterious phenomenon.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Houston's Hurricane Hell
programme.desc: When Hurricane Harvey hits Houston, the city is overwhelmed by four feet of rain in four days, causing catastrophic flooding and billions of dollars in damage; experts use cutting-edge tech to discover what went wrong and how it can be fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Boston's Big Dig Disaster
programme.desc: Boston's Big Dig was one of the most ambitious engineering projects in history, but in 2006, a fatal collapse in one of its tunnels put the ambitious project in doubt; experts reveal what caused this engineering disaster and how it was fixed.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Crash of the Titan
programme.desc: As one of the largest construction cranes in the world lifts a one-million-ton section of roof for Milwaukee's Miller Park stadium, it suddenly collapses. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Terror in Tacoma
programme.desc: After a giant suspension bridge begins to violently rock, it suddenly collapses, marking one of the most iconic engineering disasters of all time; using the latest science, experts reveal what went so catastrophically wrong at the Tacoma Narrows bridge.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster
programme.desc: The Deepwater Horizon oil rig drilled into the deepest oil reserves on the planet, but a sudden explosion on-board led to the worst oil spill in history. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science finally fixed this catastrophe.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Olympic Stadium Fiasco
programme.desc: Montreal's Olympic Stadium was an ambitious engineering project with a striking Space Age design, but it's distinctive roof had caused over one billion dollars in cost overruns. Experts reveal what went wrong and how cutting-edge science can fix it.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Dangers of Success
programme.desc: As a prominent family awakens to noises in the night, their worst nightmare ensues when their beloved daughter Terri Ann McCoy is fatally shot. Investigators work through leads and lies to discover the perpetrators were closer than they realized.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Tragedy Comes in Pairs
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice in the desert town of Socorro, New Mexico, when Crystal Houston is found murdered just 14 months after her older sister, Stephanie, is killed in a suspicious accident.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Answering the Call
programme.desc: When a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, TN, first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharpton at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Last Face She Saw
programme.desc: When the most popular pizza restaurant of little Claypool Hill, VA is turned into a horrific crime scene, everybody is stunned. With clues revealing more than robbery, law enforcement know they must move fast to catch the killer.

programme.title: Homicide City: Deadly Dance
programme.desc: When a bright, young, exotic dancer is found dead at the bottom of a 12-story bridge, detectives must determine if it's a suicide or the work of a sinister character who wanted more than a dance.

programme.title: Homicide City: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: When a hard-working, pregnant mother vanishes, detectives stumble on a love-triangle that may explain the secrets behind her death.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Torture Chamber
programme.desc: When Lisa Holden gets married and moves to an isolated home in rural Texas, it triggers a long, inexplicable estrangement from her family. But at the root of this painful divide lies something far more evil than her family could ever imagine.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Homicide City: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: When a hard-working, pregnant mother vanishes, detectives stumble on a love-triangle that may explain the secrets behind her death.

programme.title: Dead Silent: The Torture Chamber
programme.desc: When Lisa Holden gets married and moves to an isolated home in rural Texas, it triggers a long, inexplicable estrangement from her family. But at the root of this painful divide lies something far more evil than her family could ever imagine.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: The Friends You Keep
programme.desc: Home will never feel safe again after Jill finds her daughter Emma Walker cold to the touch in her own bed. Quickly ruling out suicide, investigators search for a suspicious man in black caught on a neighbor's home surveillance camera.

programme.title: Homicide City: Pine Hill Massacre
programme.desc: When Bill and Catherine Stuart are executed in their home along with their three-year-old daughter, police look to the surviving daughter Miriam for clues. Her description of the killer leads detectives deep into Philadelphia's criminal underworld.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: Right Place, Wrong Time
programme.desc: When a young woman is found sexually assaulted and bleeding from a single bullet wound at work, it first appears to be a robbery gone horribly wrong. But over the years the investigation snares multiple suspects, before taking a sharp turn 10 years later.

programme.title: Shadow of Doubt: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: A 15 year old goes missing after heading out into the park to take pictures. Two days later, police find her badly beaten body and a clue that leads back to her high school.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Blood Trail
programme.desc: Tom and Jill Estes' bodies are found behind a dumpster in Festus, Missouri. Police are baffled, until a receipt leads to CCTV of a blood-stained suspect. A trail of bodies reveals a killer who must be stopped - before he strikes again.

programme.title: See No Evil: The Man in the Red Jacket
programme.desc: On Valentine's night, 2015, 27-year-old James Enright is stabbed to death outside a busy train station in Burnaby, Canada. Despite cell phone footage of the attack, police struggle to identify his killer, until CCTV leads them to an unlikely suspect.

programme.title: See No Evil: Maurice's Last Visitor
programme.desc: On December 10th, 2011, Maurice Byrd is found dead in his home with multiple gunshot wounds. Security footage from a neighboring church reveals that prior to his body being discovered, Maurice had many visitors.

programme.title: See No Evil: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Larry Weaver spends the night in Sikeston, Missouri. The next day he vanishes without a trace. Police launch a statewide search and rescue mission, but only when they turn to surveillance cameras, do they find out the terrifying truth of what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: Seeking Out Maple
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 28th, 2011, student Maple Batalia is found shot dead in the parking lot of Simon Fraser University.

programme.title: See No Evil: All That It Seems
programme.desc: A traffic accident on the Interstate near Des Moines, Iowa, produces one casualty.

programme.title: See No Evil: At Michelle's Door
programme.desc: The News Year's disappearance of Michelle Thornton leads to a gruesome discovery. With no witnesses, only the four security cameras from her apartment building can help decipher what happened.

programme.title: See No Evil: We Never Fight
programme.desc: A family's worst nightmare begins when 23-year-old Christina Morris goes missing while out with friends in Plano, Texas. Police franticly search to find her alive, but it's the discovery of surveillance camera footage that reveals the shocking truth.

programme.title: See No Evil: It Looks Like You
programme.desc: A quiet town is shaken to its core when an innocent woman is gunned down in broad daylight. Detectives desperately act to find her killer and restore the peace. With a murderer on the loose, can video surveillance uncover what lies beneath?

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Megan
programme.desc: When a teenager goes missing from her local Walmart, detectives struggle for leads. But then surveillance cameras reveal terrifying footage of a prowler kidnapping her, transforming this investigation into a desperate race to bring her home alive.

programme.title: Against the Odds: A Chance in Hell: The Battle of Ramadi
programme.desc: When Colonel McFarland arrived in Iraq, Al-Qaeda had already declared Ramadi the capital of a new caliphate. The soldiers of McFarland's Ready First Combat Team fight to give American a victory.

programme.title: Against the Odds: 46 Days of Hell in Fallujah
programme.desc: Charlie Company of the 1st Cavalry Division wanders into an NVA stronghold. A blistering attack leaves supplies low, casualties mounting and the enemy circle tightening. Team Alpha, hearing the distress calls, volunteers to try the difficult rescue.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Death Ridges of Peleliu
programme.desc: The First Marine Division forged a ferocious struggle with the Japanese at Peleliu. It would take 74 days and cost 10,000 American lives but the blood and courage of this small band of heroes would ultimately break the back of the enemy.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: D-Day and Liberation
programme.desc: Listen to the astonishing stories behind the liberation of France and hear the price many soldiers had to pay in order for the Allies to take France back from the Germans.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Mass Graves
programme.desc: The armies of the Third Reich invaded the USSR in 1941. Mobile commandos, the Einsatzgruppen, were following their advance to Stalingrad with the mission of eliminating all Jews on the conquered territories.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Funeral Pyres
programme.desc: Faced with the advancing Soviet troops, Nazi Germany decides to have the bodies of death camp victims dug up and burned in graves.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Judenfrei
programme.desc: After the EZG's intervention, Romania, Bulgaria, Hungary and the Baltic states are declared "Judenfrei": free of Jews.

programme.title: Nazi Death Squads: Time of Reckoning
programme.desc: After being judged at the Nuremberg trials, the majority of those responsible for the murders of nearly 1.5 million Jews would walk free in the 1950s.

programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.desc: Tom installs an old-school doorbell that the homeowners wanted to keep. Sally and kitchen designer Kathy Marshall show off the kitchen's functionality. A space for the kids is downstairs as well as a workshop for John. The energy auditor tests the home.

programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Structural issues at their two clients' houses means Mike and Michael must split up and tackle the jobs separately. Michael takes on the roof and other problems at The City Barn, while Mike uncovers unsettling complications.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Not a Dry Eye in the House
programme.desc: The Flood House is close to completion and the showpiece gas fireplace with a custom mantel brings one of the homeowners to tears. Over at The City Barn, more structural issues arise, creating greater challenges than Mike and the team expected.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: Mike and the team start on a third project and declare it 'The Toxic Townhouse' after a home inspection uncovers terrible toxic elements and a dangerous pipe issue. Then, the team makes another disturbing discovery at The City Barn.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: No Bones About It
programme.desc: Police are called to investigate after Michael makes a startling discovery at The City Barn. Then, Mike shows The Toxic Townhouse's owners the structural issues and dangerous gas line.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Bringing the Heat
programme.desc: Mike and the team install a new furnace at The Toxic Townhouse, replacing the decade-old gas fireplace the homeowners were using to heat the home. Then, The City Barn owners are welcomed home with a reveal that takes their breath away.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Philadelphia

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Austin
programme.desc: In Austin, Texas, Eddie Hall pumps up his appetite in a race of strength vs. speed with superbike legend Colin 'Texas Tornado' Edwards.

programme.title: Eddie Eats America: Manhattan
programme.desc: Stoke strongman Eddie Hall goes head to head against long-time rival Brian Shaw, pulling a 23-ton truck and attempting the notorious skyscraper 'Monster' sandwich from Sarge's Deli.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Milwaukee, WI
programme.desc: Casey travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken and a four-and-a-half-pound Reuben sandwich challenge.

programme.title: Man v. Food: New York, NY
programme.desc: Casey travels to New York City for the best in big city eats, including an insane challenge that has him choosing between a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Jose, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's epicurean expedition takes him to San Jose, CA. His first stop is a one-of-a-kind drive-in for a crispy and golden falafel sandwich.

programme.title: Man v. Food: San Francisco

programme.title: Man v. Food: Mystic, Connecticut

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Most-Epic Wins

programme.desc: When Dhruv’s pocket watch is found in Raj the chicken's coop, Mira must figure out how it got there. Mikku and Chikku's tiny instruments go missing, so Mira must track them down.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Bluey: Kids/ Butterflies/ The Creek
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey want to play a game during a shopping trip; Bluey runs away, leaving Bingo all alone; The kids and Dad go on an outing to the creek.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: It's Pony: Plants/ Heston's Coat

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Amphibia: Anne or Beast?/ Best Fronds
programme.desc: Sprig tries to capture a mysterious beast to prove that he's responsible; Sprig takes Anne swimming in a nearby lake to help her feel less homesick.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Ready for the Bettys/ The Flying Fishmonger
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb accidentally discover Perry's secret lair and are thrust into a spy mission of their own.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Crack That Whip/ The Best Lazy Day Ever
programme.desc: The guys build a roller derby rink for their grandma.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Hand That Rocks the Mabel
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel discover their seemingly cherubic new neighbour, Lil' Gideon, happens to be the town's adored psychic. But when Dipper convinces Mabel to go on a date with Gideon to question his authenticity, she soon learns that his cuteness can fade.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper and Mabel vs. the Future
programme.desc: Mabel decides to plan for her and Dipper's 13th birthday party. Meanwhile, Dipper ventures below the town to find its most shocking secret.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Last Mabelcorn
programme.desc: A new threat leads Mabel to venture into the enchanted realm of the unicorns. Meanwhile, Dipper learns an unexpected twist about the enigmatic Bill Cipher.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Weirdmageddon
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel Pines are sent to spend the summer with their Great Uncle Sam.

programme.title: Amphibia: Toad Tax/ Prison Break
programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: A Night at the Inn/ Wally and Anne
programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
programme.desc: A scary mushroom adventure! Anne wins the prestigious “Frog of the Year” award and gets to plan her own party, but the frogs of Wartwood may not be ready for a human-style bash.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Ballad of Hopediah Plantar/ Anne Hunter
programme.desc: Hop Pop's efforts to be hailed as a hero amongst some small-town folks backfires when he stands up to the wrong family. Then, when the family is in danger, Anne must put her self-consciousness aside in order to learn the true way of the hunter.

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher
programme.desc: Hop Pop drops Sprig and Polly off at an obstacle-filled mountain trail designed to help them get along. Sasha and Grime must reconcile their differences to escape Newtopia's most skilled warrior, General Yunnan.

programme.title: NBA: The Jump
programme.desc: Daily NBA discussion featuring the latest news and stories with a panel of NBA analysts and current players.

programme.title: Pardon the Interruption

programme.desc: The plaintiff says an event planner ruined her first baby shower and is suing for breach of contract. Then, a dog is stolen from a child, but the defendant says she spent almost a month searching for its owner.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: Woman married to the defendant claims a year after they had a child, the defendant left because he didn’t want to be a husband or a father. They reconciled, but she is suing him for unpaid rent.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Refusing a Rebate.'

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: River Rafting Nightmare/ Bad Style
programme.desc: A man seeks reimbursement for river rafting trip; a woman sues wardrobe stylist after loaned merchandise isn’t returned.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Quatesha says Cody is responsible for $2,740 in damages to her car and she wants payment. Cody says he never damaged Quatesha’s car and after borrowing it returned it in good condition.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Is She Capable of Abusing Her Own Child?
programme.desc: When Yazmin’s son was only 2 months old, she took him to the hospital. X-rays revealed several fractures to the newborn. The injuries were said to be healing and believed to be caused by child abuse. Yazmin denies that she was abusing her child.

programme.title: Maury

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Proposals... Denied
